meta.name: 4-Tris
meta.desc:
Los tetrominós son piezas formadas por 4 bloques unidos en 7 patrones diferentes. Al rotarlas, puedes posicionarlas mientras caen para que llenen los espacios abiertos. Cuando una línea horizontal completa se llena con las piezas, la línea se elimina ¡y avanzas hacia niveles superiores!
Los bloques caerán desde la parte superior de la pantalla hacia la parte inferior. Organiza las piezas de manera que una fila quede completamente llena con los bloques. Si no lo logras, la pantalla se irá llenando, dificultando cada vez más despejar las filas. Una fila eliminada desaparecerá, dándote puntos y facilitando el juego.

meta.name: ABPA Backgammon
meta.desc:
Intellivision Backgammon is identical with the board game. Backgammon is a game played by two players (the computer can be one of the players). Each player has 15 pieces. The object of the game is to be the first to move all your pieces completely around and finally off the board. Moving your pieces off the board is called "bearing off". The first player to bear off all his pieces is the winner. Each player moves in a direction beginning from his opponent's Home Table and coming around to his own Home Table. Thus one player always moves clockwise and the other always 
counterclockwise.
You can play against the computer at two skill levels - one for beginners or intermediate, another for experts - or two players can compete against each other. It displays the American Backgammon Players Association (ABPA) logo.

meta.name: Advanced Dungeons & Dragons
meta.desc: Persigue la antigua Corona de los Reyes en el juego de Advanced Dungeons & Dragons. Controlas un grupo de tres personas equipadas con tres flechas cada una, aunque puedes encontrar más flechas durante tu búsqueda. Explora el territorio de la Montaña Nublada y adéntrate en cuevas llenas de enemigos que intentarán detener tu progreso. Cuatro niveles de dificultad mantienen el juego fresco y desafiante tanto para expertos como para principiantes.

n: Advanced Dungeons and Dragons - Treasure of Tarmin (1982)(Mattel)

meta.path: ./Advanced Dungeons and Dragons - Treasure of Tarmin (1982)(Mattel).zip
meta.name: Advanced Dungeons and Dragons - Treasure of Tarmin
meta.desc:
The search for treasure leads to high adventure, as you wind through an underground maze of corridors, gates, hidden doors, ladders and rooms. Inside the maze are weapons, magical items, spiritual books,...and the Tarmin treasure! But beware. Within these walls also lurk deadly monsters and horrifying beasts...including the repulsive Minotaur...just waiting for you!
The flashing white dot in the map of the ancient castle tells you where you are and how to get to the Tarmin treasure!
Conquering your way through ever-deeper beast-infested labyrinths, can only lead to the ultimate confrontation - the Minotaur!
A world of challenge for 1 player vs. the computer
4 skill levels. 3-way scoring keeps track of your spiritual and weapon strength. Treasure score keeps track of your wealth.
Monsters and other dreadful creatures keep your heart pounding. Stay alert!
Endless choices to make: which corridor to take, which room to explore, which objects to picks up.
Multi-purpose keys and buttons plus colorful symbols add to the challenge and entertainment.

meta.name: Adventure -AD&D- Cloudy Mountain
meta.desc: Viaja a una tierra de tesoros, aventuras y oscuros peligros. Dirige una expedición de tres hombres a través de sinuosas cuevas montañosas en busca de herramientas y flechas. En estas cavernas te esperan monstruos mortales. Mata a los monstruos, supera los obstáculos de una tierra hostil y entra en la legendaria Montaña de las Nubes. Allí encontrarás la Corona de Reyes... y el terror más mortífero de todos, el Dragón Alado.

meta.name: Air Strike
meta.desc: Estás pilotando un biplano a través del territorio enemigo. Lanza bombas en fábricas y depósitos de municiones. ¡Enfréntate en combates aéreos a muerte contra aviones enemigos! Debido a la popularidad (especialmente entre los programadores de APh y Mattel) del juego de biplanos en el cartucho Triple Action, APh propuso esta versión para un solo jugador. Se mostró a Mattel un prototipo con un terreno montañoso en movimiento y objetivos que podían ser bombardeados. Los gráficos del avión, los efectos de sonido y el control de vuelo se tomaron directamente de Biplanes. (Los aviones enemigos, que habrían representado un desafío de programación de inteligencia artificial, no se incluyeron en el prototipo, pero se prometieron para el juego final). Se lanzó una versión incompleta pero jugable en 1998 en el CD Intellivision Lives!.

meta.name: World Series Major League Baseball
meta.desc:
World Series Major League Baseball es un juego de beisbol que soporta tanto ECS como Intellivoice (para anuncios jugada por jugada). el juego esta basado en estadísticas reales de beisbol (aunque los nombres reales fueron cambiados a ficticios antes de su lanzamiento) y ofrece juegos de beisbol usando múltiples cámaras (incluyendo pantalla dividida durante el juego), mostrando el juego en #D en vez de desplazamiento horizontal.
Soporta 3 jugadores simultáneamente, donde una cámara central es usada para mostrara al pitcher y al bateador. Mientras un jugador escoge el estilo de Pitcheo, el bateador decide si batear o detenerse, entonce las pantalla cambia a una cámara externa para que el jugador que esta en la defensa controle a los jardineros mientras e otro jugador controla a los corredores en las bases, el juego puede ser salvado y cargado a traves de los Chips RAM del cartucho

meta.name: Armor Battle
meta.desc:
It's armored conflict and you command the spearhead! Combat missions galore in this computerized tank battle! Maneuver two tanks through hundreds of different terrains! Battles are waged with a full complement of simulated sound effects to add to the realism!
All-out tank combat! You and your opponent are rival commanders. Each of you must maneuver, lay mines, go for tactical surprise!
A two player game...you and your opponent each have two tanks per battle.
You play your tactics on over hundreds of different battlefield maps!
Assess the battlefield, avoid mines, and move quickly over roads or slowly through fields or water.
Knock out both of your opponent's tanks and win the battle!
Complement of simulated sound and visual effects such as explosions, gunfire, tank engines, much more!

meta.name: Astrosmash
meta.desc:
En Astrosmash, controlas un cañon laser en la base de la pantalla; la meta es ganar la mayor cantidad de puntos posible destrullendo los meteoritos, bombas y otros objetos que van cayendo. Los meteoritos son la amenaza mas comun de la que debes defenderte. Caen en varios colores y tamaños y algunos se dividen en dos partes mas pegueñas cuando les disparas. 
Mezclados con los meteoritos estan las bombas rotatorias. mientras que dejar pasar un meteorito solo baja tu puntaje, debes dispararle a las bombas. si se pasa una perderas una vida. En los niveles mas dificiles Ovnis y misiles dirigidos aparecen ocacionalmente e intentan destruir tu cañon.
Si te encuentras es una situacion desesperada y sin salida, tu cañon entrara en el hiperespacio y sera transportado instantaneamente a otra ubicacion en la pantalla. Pero ten cuidado por que puedes ser transportado a una situacion aun peor. El juego termina cuando todos tus cañones han sido destruidos.

meta.name: Astrosmash: Meteor
meta.desc: Astrosmash fue originalmente concevido cuando un juego llamado Meteor!, un clon de Asteroids, no entraba entero en un cartucho. La habitación extra fue usada para crear la variante del juego

meta.name: Atlantis
meta.desc: ¡La ciudad perdida de Atlántida está bajo ataque! Ola tras ola de naves Gorgon se acercan, cada una armada con armas capaces de destruir una parte de la ciudad. Tú estás a cargo de los puestos de mando en los bordes de la ciudad y debes defenderla de los invasores. Las diferentes naves Gorgon seguirán volando por la pantalla en números variables y en diferentes patrones de vuelo. Al principio vuelan alto en el cielo, pero luego progresivamente más bajo. Si un enemigo llega lo suficientemente bajo antes de que lo destruyas, usará sus armas y destruirá uno de los edificios de Atlántida. A medida que avanzas en el juego, las naves enemigas irán aumentando su velocidad. El juego termina cuando todos los edificios restantes de la ciudad han sido destruidos.

meta.name: Auto Racing
meta.desc: Auto Racing is a one or two player racing game that puts the player behind the wheel of one of five cars, each with different specialties. The player may  race on five different fairly large courses. In the one player game, the player is racing the clock to finish five laps as quickly as possible. In the two player game, the player can race a friend and gain points for either the opponent crashing or if one is leading far enough to reach the edge of the screen.

meta.name: B-17 Bomber
meta.desc: B-17 Bomber takes place near the end of World War II. As the pilot of a B-17, your mission is to fly across the English Channel and bomb various strategic targets. First you need to select a destination which features a lot of targets. The further the target is from your home base, the more points you can earn, but with more ground to cover there will be more enemy fighters blocking the target and more fuel will be needed. Once a destination is set, you need to stock your plane with bombs and fuel, then take off! You will now have a first person point of view from the plane and can control which of several views is active. When trying to bomb targets, you will be looking straight down from the bombay doors. When you hear a voice announce incoming enemy planes, you need to switch the view to one of the guns and defend yourself. Lastly you can have a view from the cockpit to control the plane. If your fuel runs low, or your plane takes too much damage, you can fly back to your home base for repairs and then take off again to bomb as many targets as you can!

meta.name: Baseball
meta.desc:
Major League Baseball is an action baseball game for two players. The game follows most professional baseball rules and allows you to control all of the players on the team. You can throw a variety of pitches (from curve balls to fast balls), steal bases, tag players out, bunt, try for a home run, and in the event of a tie the game goes into extra innings! Several difficulty levels are available which control the game speed and whether or not stealing bases is allowed.
The game was rereleased as "Big League Baseball" by INTV. Sears sold it under the more generic name of "Baseball."

meta.name: BeamRider
meta.desc: Beamrider es un juego de acción arcade en 3-D. Controlas una nave espacial con la misión de limpiar 99 sectores del espacio de alienígenas hostiles. La nave espacial está situada en la parte inferior de la pantalla y sólo puede detenerse en uno de los cinco haces de luz. Estás armado con láseres y torpedos; Los torpedos son más poderosos y pueden destruir más enemigos en comparación con los láseres, sin embargo, solo obtienes tres por nivel. Para completar un sector, debes destruir quince platillos voladores blancos y después el centinela del sector. Cada sector de número par hasta el sector 16 agregará un nuevo tipo de enemigo al que enfrentarse. Estos enemigos adicionales solo intentarán ralentizar tu misión, porque solo es necesario destruir los platillos volantes para avanzar. Ocasionalmente aparecerá un power-up para ganar una vida extra, pero si le disparas accidentalmente se convertirá en un enemigo mas.

meta.name: Beauty and the Beast
meta.desc: En “Beauty and the Beast” encarnas a Colin, un joven que debe desafiar los proyectiles del siniestro Mathias para rescatar a su prometida. Trepa por las ventanas abiertas del edificio, evitando los murciélagos, ratas y cuervos que acechan el antiguo edificio. Afortunadamente, la frágil Adèle le ayuda arrojándole corazones que le aportan una energía extra. Con gráficos agradables y bastante detallados, esta adaptación de “Donkey Kong” es original y divertida.

meta.name: Blockade Runner
meta.desc: A 3D shoot 'em up. You have to guide a fleet of four merchant space freighters to Earth with vital supplies. Hostile aliens have sighted you and forced you enter a dangerous asteroid belt. And now, you must try to avoid these asteroids, to destroy the Robot mines and alien space ships and also contend with fuel shortages and prevent the deflector shields from over-heating.

p: Body Slam - Super Pro Wrestling (1988)(Intv Corp).zip
n: Body Slam - Super Pro Wrestling (1988)(Intv Corp)

meta.name: Body Slam: Super Pro Wrestling
meta.desc:
En Body Slam: Super Pro Wrestling, el objetivo es derrotar a tu oponente en el ring. Debes usar fuerza, estrategia y un toque de astucia. Cada combate consiste en una serie de rounds de cuatro minutos. No hay un número limitado de rounds, por lo que el combate continúa hasta que un jugador gane o se declare un empate. El primer luchador que logre mantener a su oponente en el suelo durante 3 segundos será el ganador.
Controlas a un luchador seleccionado entre 12 personajes diferentes. Tu oponente puede ser controlado por otro jugador o por la computadora. Si eliges un combate de equipo, tú y tu oponente controlarán a 2 luchadores que se turnarán en el ring.

meta.name: Bomb Squad
meta.desc:
The terrorist Boris has placed a bomb in the city! As a member of the bomb squad, it is the player's job to disarm the bomb before it explodes. 
Start the game with a view of the code number display which is damaged. In order to find the code which disarms the bomb, the player has to repair the various circuits in order to fix the display. By selecting a square on the code number display, the player will be brought to the corresponding circuit which can be repaired using cutters, pliers, and soldering iron. The player's partner, Frank, will guide through the repairs by telling the player what needs to be done, in what order repairs should be performed, and by helping the player position the tools. Depending on the circuit, the player may need to cut out parts or replace parts (spare parts are located at the top of the screen). If the player use an incorrect replacement part, or perform the repairs in the wrong order, the player will lose time or even cause the bomb to explode. 
On the more difficult skill levels, circuit parts may even overheat and cause a fire; luckily, the player also have a fire extinguisher with you to deal with this situation! When enough circuits have been repaired, the player can decipher the code, enter it into the computer, and the bomb will be disarmed (an incorrect guess will cause it to explode, however). The player may choose to have a one, two, or three digit code to guess and several difficulty levels are available.

meta.name: ZZZ(notgame):Bouncing Pixels
meta.desc:
SDK-1600 is a fully-fledged development kit for the Intellivision * video-game system. The tools contained within it were used to write the first new game in a decade for the Intellivision: 4-Tris. SDK-1600 derives its name from the CP-1600 CPU that lies at the heart of the Intellivision. You can run the programs created with this kit using one of the available Intellivision Emulators, or by using Chad Schell's Intellicart.
Here are various demos included in SDK-1600. Altogether, 19 complete Intellivision programs and over 2 dozen library functions are provided.

meta.name: Boxing
meta.desc:
Two contenders fight themselves for 15 rounds with body punches, feints and hard shots to the head. Victory is decided by the points, assigned by the computer (the referee), otherwise the match ends with a KO. Every round last 1 minute and 30 seconds.
The 2 players can choose their boxer (but not the same) from a rose of six men with different characteristics (speed, offensive power, endurance). The number six is unpredictable.

meta.name: Brickout
meta.desc:
An alien force field has blocked your only means of escape, preventing you from returning home. Your only hope is to use your supply of proton balls to try and destroy the field, one block at a time. Use your deflector to bounce proton balls against descending rows of energy layers. When a ball contacts the force field, it will neutralize that part of the barrier. But just when you think you're making some headway, more layers appear to seal you in. Just how much damage can you do to the force field before running out of proton balls?
Features
A one player action game.
Blast your way through the mysterious force field.
Take control and rack up a huge score!
Wave after wave to blast through!
Stay focused as endless layers descend upon you.

meta.name: Bump 'n' Jump
meta.desc: Bump 'N' Jump es un juego de carreras y acción que se juega desde una vista superior. Mientras corres por las peligrosas y siempre cambiantes carreteras, numerosos autos enemigos intentarán sacarte de la ruta. Debes asegurarte de chocar a los autos y apartarlos del camino antes de que te choquen y te estrelles contra los costados. Tu auto también tiene la capacidad de saltar muy alto si tienes suficiente velocidad. Esto es útil para saltar sobre los autos enemigos si hay demasiados en el camino, y también se debe utilizar para saltar huecos en la carretera y otros obstáculos en la autopista. A medida que los niveles avanzan, la carretera se estrecha con más obstáculos en el camino y los otros autos aumentan en número y agresividad.

meta.name: Burgertime
meta.desc:
Nuestro protagonista es Chef Pepper y su objetivo es hacer hamburguesas mientras huevos, salchichas y pepinillos malvados le persiguen por el área de juego.
Para hacer una hamburguesa debes reunir todos los ingredientes y dejarlos caer desde arriba hasta el área de la hamburguesa que se encuentra abajo. Chef Pepper debe pasar por todos los ingredientes de la hamburguesa. Tan pronto como pise un ingrediente (un trozo de lechuga, por ejemplo), caerá al siguiente nivel. La comida que caiga aplastará a cualquier enemigo que te siga y también golpeará cualquier otro ingrediente que se encuentre debajo. Como defensa puedes recolectar pimenteros que te permitirán expulsar una pequeña nube de pimienta que aturdirá momentáneamente a los enemigos, permitiéndote pasar junto a ellos sin recibir daño.
Conforme avances de nivel los enemigos serán más rápidos y habrá más ingredientes para montar tu hamburguesa.

meta.name: Buzz Bombers
meta.desc: Buzz Bombers is an arcade action game similar to Centipede. You control a can of bug spray at the bottom of the screen, and you need to defend yourself from the swarms of incoming bees. The bees start at the top of the screen, and fly their way back and forth, slowly heading towards the bottom of the screen. If they reach the ground, they will pollinate the flowers there which causes them to grow and will restrict movement of your spray can. When you shoot a bee, it will turn into a honeycomb. The honeycombs will cause the bees to head towards the ground even faster, since they will turn around when one is in their way. Your spray can is able to shoot the honeycombs, but if you leave them in place a hummingbird will fly around and eat the honey from them. The more honey the hummingbird eats, the more points you get. The game ends when all of your spray cans are destroyed by growing flowers.

meta.name: Carnival
meta.desc: You are at the carnival, and are going to take a chance at the shooting gallery! Your goal is to earn as many points as possible by shooting the various targets before you run out of bullets. In addition to the assorted targets that float by, there are boxes which can be shot to earn additional bullets. You also need to be careful of the ducks! From time to time, a duck will fly down and eat some of your bullets if you don't shoot it first. You move on to the next round of gameplay when the rack has been cleared of all the targets, and the game ends when you use up all of your bullets.

meta.name: Centipede
meta.desc:
GET OUT YOUR BUG BLASTER AND SAVE THAT FUNGUS!
THE THRILL OF THE ARCADE GAME
An insidious invasion of multiplying insects (centipedes, jumping spiders, poisonous scorpions, and frenzied fleas) pose different perils to the mushroom patch. You must repeatedly blast enraged creepers and stubborn obstacles or lose your enchanted fungus. Remember to listen for the distinctive sounds of the attacking bugs; and watch out for blasted centipede segments, for each one grows a new head!

meta.name: Championship Tennis
meta.desc: Se puede jugar solo, contra la computadora o con otro jugador, ya sea en individuales o en dobles. Incluso se puede jugar COM VS COM  y sólo mirar.Conquiste París, Nueva York y Wimbledon.necesitaras gran concentración y piernas fuertes para ganar en el Campeonato de Tenis. juega en Flushing Meadows, Roland Garros o Wimbledon.  A ver si tienes lo que se necesita para ganar el "Grand Slam"!.

meta.name: Checkers
meta.desc:
Challenge Tradition! Beat a friend electronically for practice. Then go for it against the Ultimate Checker Player - a Wiley computer who asks and gives no quarter.
- Two ways to play, vs. a friend or the ultimate competitor, the canny computer.
- HI and LO skill levels when playing the computer. Added difficulty... added excitement.
- "Bail Out" button - COMPUTER SUGGESTS MOVE, when you're stumped against the computer.
- Simulated sound effects - BELLS, BUZZERS, A BRONX CHEER and a VICTORY TUNE.
- No time limit on moves!
- CLEAR button that lets you change your move!

p: Chip Shot - Super Pro Golf (1987)(Intv Corp).zip
n: Chip Shot - Super Pro Golf (1987)(Intv Corp)

meta.name: Chip Shot: Super Pro Golf
meta.desc:
Welcome to the 17th hole at Pebble Beach! In this golf game, you'll experience the thrill and challenges of playing on 99 different holes, each with its own unique obstacles such as trees, sand traps, and water hazards. Before teeing off, you'll need to select your club and consider the direction of the wind. Will you be able to navigate around that tree?
Address the ball, bring back the club, and swing with a resounding THWACK! But oh no, your shot has landed in the rough. It's a difficult lie, but fear not. Pull out your trusty wedge, take a swing, and chip the ball onto the green. Now it's time for the all-important putt. Pay close attention to the flag as it will help you gauge the direction and speed of the wind. Take into account the break of the green as you line up your putt. Sink it in for a satisfying par!

meta.name: Commando
meta.desc:
TO: COMMANDO
FROM: COL N.K. NEWCOMBE
MISSION: CAPTURE ENEMY FORTRESS
This mission is TOP SECRET. We have to send you in ALONE against wave after wave of enemy soldiers. We can offer NO SUPPORT, except to give you a MACHINE GUN, a limited number of HAND GRENADES, and some advice:
- Keep moving! You will be under CONSTANT FIRE!
- Watch out for enemies in TRENCHES, behind BARRICADES, and on MOTORCYCLES!
- Different enemies require different strategies to defeat!
- Capture enemy stores of HAND GRENADES as you advance!
- Rescue prisoners of war!
Stay cool and maybe, just maybe, you can beat the odds. And if you succeed, we have another mission for you, TOUGHER THAN BEFORE...

meta.name: Congo Bongo
meta.desc: You're on a jungle safari packed full of wild and zany adventures. Climb the cliffs to the top of Monkey Mountain as you try to reach the jungle's most mischievous gorilla. Don't get clobbered by the coconuts he'll throw your way. Watch out for menacing monkeys. Beyond Monkey Mountain you'll come to Lazy Lake where you'll see raging rhinos and hollering hippos. Leap from lily pad to lily pad across the treacherous lake filled with ferocious man-eating fish and other jungle dangers, but be care... one slip and it's safari heaven!

meta.name: Crazy Clones
meta.desc:
In Crazy Clones, you are the one real person in a sea of clones. You must tag as many clones as possible while avoiding the Clone Master. When the Clone Master touches a clone, a new clone is produced. When the Clone Master touches you, the game is over.
Note: If you tag all of the clones without letting the Clone Master create a new clone, you're hosed.

meta.desc: Puede aprender muchos juegos de billar de bolsillo y de carambola en la privacidad y comodidad de su propio hogar, y repasar las reglas y la estrategia antes de aventurarse.

meta.name: Defender
meta.desc: Landers, Bombers, Baiters, Pods y Swarmers. El ataque alienígena ha llegado y la derrota a manos de invasores desquiciados amenaza a los humanoides. Su única esperanza es la nave espacial, Defender. Armado con bombas inteligentes y capaz de entrar en el hiperespacio, Defender iguala la balanza, pero se convierte en el objetivo de otro vil ataque: ¡los humanoides secuestrados transformados en mutantes asesinos!

meta.name: Demon Attack
meta.desc:
Oleadas de demonios rodean la superficie lunar y bombardean el último puesto avanzado de la Tierra, la estación lunar Tranquility. Usa tu cañón láser para destruirlos; de lo contrario, devastarán la tierra. Resiste su ataque con bombas, dispara contra sus filas y aplasta su ataque.
¡Entonces pasa a la ofensiva! Despega de la superficie lunar y lucha contra la base del demonio alienígena. Elimina el escudo parpadeante. Defiéndete de las patrullas suicidas que corren hacia ti. Coloca un tiro directamente a través de la ventana giratoria hacia el núcleo de la base enemiga y consigue la victoria.

meta.name: Dig Dug
meta.desc:
En Dig Dug, libra una guerra subterránea con tu fiel arpón. Tendrás que derrotar al duro Pooka y al feroz Fygar para avanzar al siguiente nivel.
Haz explotar a tus enemigos para que revienten o lánzales rocas. Conseguirás puntos por deshacerte de ellos o por recoger objetos de bonificación.
Este juego clásico es a la vez un juego de acción arcade de la vieja escuela y un juego de estrategia. ¡Atrae a tus enemigos hacia donde quieras que estén y aplástalos con las rocas!

meta.name: Diner
meta.desc:
In this unofficial sequel to the arcade game BurgerTime, the Rotten Foods (Hot Dogs, Cherries, Bananas, and their leader Mugsy, the Mug o' Root Beer) have thrown lunch all over the diner and Peter Pepper has to get it back on the plate. 
The game is for 1 or 2 players (but in this case they have to choose two different difficulty levels). Peter Pepper must kick the Food Balls (red Meatballs, green Lettuce Heads, white Rice, tan Mashed Potatoes, and yellow Macaroni) scattered throughout the diner. The Food Ball will roll across the floor, down ramps, and over ledges. If it's close enough to the bottom of the screen, it will roll right onto the plate.
When a plate is full, Side Orders appear in the diner: if Peter picks them up, he earns 250 points and 1 pepper. When he fills 4 plates (finish four game screens), he enters the Blue Plate Special bonus round: Food Balls start raining across the screen and Peter can eat all them, but the flashing ones, for extra points.
With them he can squish the Rotten Food too, earning extra points. He can shake pepper to stop them momentarily or simply run away. If a Rotten Food touch him, he loses a turn. Peter can obtain a new turn every 20.000 points. If he run out of turns the game ends.

meta.name: Donkey Kong
meta.desc: En Donkey Kong, Mario debe rescatar a una damisela en apuros, Lady, de un gigantesco simio llamado Donkey Kong. El héroe y el simio se convirtieron más tarde en dos de los personajes más populares de Nintendo. El juego se divide en cuatro etapas diferentes de una sola pantalla. Cada una representa 25 metros de la estructura que Donkey Kong ha escalado, siendo cada etapa 25 metros más alta que la anterior. La pantalla final ocurre a los 100 metros.

meta.name: Donkey Kong Jr.
meta.desc: Donkey Kong Jr. was originally released in the arcades in 1982 as a sequel to Donkey Kong.

meta.name: Dracula
meta.desc: As the sun sets, Dracula rises, hungry for the blood of fresh victims.  As Dracula, the goal of this game is to stalk the streets at night, feeding on people walking the streets, or by luring them out of their homes.  As Dracula bites his victims, his actions will call the attention of the local constable who will try to slow him down by driving a stake into him.  Dracula can respond by either turning one of his victims into zombies to attack the police, or by transforming into a bat to escape capture.  Even the forces of nature are against the vampire, as wolves will attack him on foot, and hawks will drag away his bat form.  Dracula must feed on a certain number of victims and return to his tomb before sunrise, or he will not survive to feed another night.

meta.name: Dragonfire
meta.desc: ¡Los tesoros del rey han sido robados! Como joven y audaz príncipe, tu objetivo es recuperarlos a todos. Los tesoros se guardan en diferentes castillos, cada uno custodiado por un dragón de fuego. Cada nivel del juego tiene dos partes, primero tienes que cruzar el puente levadizo del castillo. ¡Tendrás que saltar y esquivar las bolas de fuego de los dragones y evitar las flechas voladoras para llegar al otro lado! En la segunda parte, tienes que recoger todos los tesoros de la pantalla y ponerlos en un lugar seguro mientras evitas al dragón que corre por la parte inferior de la pantalla. Los dragones de cada nivel tienen diferentes patrones de movimiento y disparo, y a medida que avanzan los niveles se vuelven más rápidos y complicados.

meta.name: The Dreadnaught Factor
meta.desc: The Zorban Dreadnaughts are spaceships that are 140,000 feet long and weigh 970 megatons, making them the largest, most heavily armoured spaceships ever created. A fleet of these large battlecraft are now heading towards your home planet, and it is your job to stop them! The game is played from a side scrolling overhead point of view as your small but agile spaceship flies past the dreadnaughts. On each pass your spaceship makes, you need to try and bomb as many of the energy vents as possible. When all energy vents on a dreadnaught are destroyed, that dreadnaught will explode. Time is limited, though, and if you make too many passes to destroy the energy vents the dreadnaught will be within firing range of your home planet and will destroy it. Each of the dreadnaughts are heavily armed; guns, canons, missiles, and other weapons are located on each dreadnaught and will be trying their best to end your mission. Multiple skill levels are included which alter the number of dreadnaughts you must destroy, as well as their speed and firing capabilities.

meta.name: Thin Ice
meta.desc:
Duncan es un pingüino al que le encanta patinar sobre hielo fino. Mientras Duncan patina, corta el hielo del suelo; si patina completamente alrededor de otro pingüino el hielo se rompe y el pingüino cae al agua helada. Duncan sólo tiene dos preocupaciones: la foca a la que le encanta hacerle rebotar con la nariz y los ​​osos polares a los que les gusta golpearlo.
Controlas a Duncan que debe patinar alrededor de los otros pingüinos para que caigan al agua mientras evitas a los osos y a las focas. Devora cócteles de camarones para aumentar la velocidad. Una vez has conseguido echar al agua todos los pingüinos, aparecen más y el juego continúa en el siguiente nivel, ¡más difícil que antes!

meta.name: Easter Eggs
meta.desc: The Design & Development department created a "Happy Holidays" cartridge to demonstrate pagable roms.  Demo screens and some simple animations created.

meta.name: Electric Company: Math Fun
meta.desc: Math Fun es un juego educativo que puede ser jugado por uno o dos jugadores. Cada jugador controla un gorila que camina por la jungla. A medida que el gorila avanza, se encontrará con una criatura que tiene un problema matemático. Debes ingresar la respuesta correcta al problema lo más rápido posible. Si respondes correctamente, tu gorila puede continuar avanzando. Si respondes incorrectamente, tu gorila debe saltar al río. Tu gorila no puede salir del río y continuar hasta que respondas otro problema matemático correctamente. El objetivo es responder correctamente la mayor cantidad de problemas en el menor tiempo posible. El juego incluye dieciocho niveles de dificultad diferentes que se pueden configurar individualmente para cada jugador.

meta.desc:
Word Fun was developed in conjuction with the Children's Television Workshop, and features three different word based educational games. The games are:
Crosswords, letter hunt and Word Rockets.

meta.name: Entertainment Computer System's EXEC-BASIC ROM, The (1978)(Mattel)
Fathom
meta.desc: Neptina, Neptune's daughter, has been imprisoned at the bottom of the sea by Titans. Your goal is to rescue her by locating the scattered pieces of a magical trident! You will need to take the form of a dolphin and a bird in order to locate the pieces that are hidden in the ocean and clouds. When flying in the air, there are several screens that have clouds flying by. Touch all of the clouds, and the trident piece appears! Other birds which are flying around will cause you to lose energy if you touch them accidentally. Underwater, trident pieces can be found by touching the sea horses. Octopuses, sharks, and a deadly maze of seaweed will get in your way and cause you to lose energy if caught! When you have located all of the trident pieces, the cage holding Neptina can be unlocked, but if you run out of energy first the game will be over.

meta.name: Frog Bog
meta.desc: You control one of two frogs sitting on a lily pad in a bog. The object of the game is to eat as many flies as you can in the three minute time limit. Your frog can jump back and forth between the two lily pads in order to catch the flies that go by overhead. When jumping, be careful not to fall in the water or your frog will have to swim back to the lily pad which can waste time. The game can be played during the day, or at night making it more difficult to see the flies. At the end of the time limit, whichever player has eaten more flies wins! One player can compete against a computer controlled frog, or two players against each other.

meta.name: Frogger
meta.desc:
Your task in this arcade conversion is to guide a frog across a treacherous road and river, and to safety at the top of the screen. Both these sections are fraught with a variety of hazards, each of which will kill the frog and cost you a life if contact is made.
The road is full of cars and trucks, at variable speeds. The river water itself is fatal, as are the snakes which hover within on later levels. Frogger must use the arrangement of logs, turtles (which are only there for a short time) and alligators (but stay away form their faces), and then jump into one of the open home-cells, ideally one containing a fly for extra points. Once all holes have been filled, you move onto the next, harder, level.

meta.name: Go For The Gold
meta.desc: Un cartucho no lanzado con cuatro juegos previamente lanzados con licencia de los Juegos Olímpicos de Sarajevo 1984. Los juegos incluirían Esquí, Hockey, Boxeo y Baloncesto. En 1998, la pantalla de menú del prototipo se incluyó en el CD Intellivision Lives!

meta.name: Grid Shock
meta.desc: An arcade game. Carom your shots against the moving wall to fill in the pattern on the back grid.

meta.name: ZZZ(notgame):Groovy
meta.desc: This is a demo that uses the Intellivisions sound chip (no intellivoice here) to say the word 'Groovy' - repeatedly.. Ad nauseum..

meta.name: Happy Trails
meta.desc: Happy Trails is an action strategy game for one or two players. Black Bart has robbed the stagecoach, and you need to recover all of the stolen money within the given time limit! The money is located in various locations in a series of maze-like paths. The paths are broken up into tiles, and there is one tile missing so you can rearrange the maze by moving a tile into the empty space. As your character walks through the paths, you need to rearrange the tiles to make sure there is always a connected path in front of him (or you'll lose a life) and to guide him towards the money bags. When all of the money has been recovered, you move on to the next round. On the more difficult rounds, Black Bart will also be wandering around the maze trying to stop you! You should avoid him at all costs, unless you have first collected a star which gives your character temporary invincibility.

meta.name: Hard Hat
meta.desc:
Place your workman on the floor where the center moving scaffold is. Run to the scaffold and your workman will jump from the building to the scaffold. Pick up a pane of glass and move it into place. Complete your building before your opponent does. If your opponent is getting ahead of you, do not fret; run over to his building and knock off his panes!
Programmers at Mattel Electronics came up with a series of casual games meant to be played at parties. The "Party Line" cartridge was shown at the 1984 CES but never produced.

meta.name: Horse Racing
meta.desc:
This game is for 1 up to 6 players. When the game begins, you can place the bets, for the winner or  for the first and second place. Then you can choose if an horse must be driven by a player or by the CPU. Only the third and the fourth horse can be driven by the players. There are 3 types of terrain: turf, mud or dry. 
When the race begins, the horses are speedier at the beginning, slower toward the end. They are different for speed at the starting gate, stamina, speed at the straight line, and for speed with different conditions of the race terrain. You (and the CPU too!) have the whip and the coax to spur a horse, and these tools could be useful to win a race even with a more tired horse.

meta.name: Hover Force
meta.desc:
Las fuerzas terroristas han tomado el control de la ciudad isleña de New Seeburg. Están equipados con helicópteros de combate fuertemente armados, por lo que la única forma de combatirlos es en el aire. El jugador pilota el helicóptero ultrasecreto JAF-3000 y debe destruir a los enemigos con los cañones láser y apagar los incendios con los cañones de agua. También hay una pantalla de radar que muestra todos los daños causados por los terroristas, los incendios extinguidos y los enemigos derribados.
Los ataques de los terroristas pueden dañar el motor, el sistema de navegación, los cañones y el radar. El jugador puede regresar a la base principal (Force Island) para reparaciones y reabastecimiento, pero solo dos veces por misión (la tercera vez después de eliminar a todos los enemigos). El juego, para un jugador, termina si el helicóptero se estrella.

meta.name: Hypnotic Lights
meta.desc: DEVELOPMENT HISTORY While experimenting with Intellivision graphics, someone in the Design & Development department came up with a kaleidoscopic effect using sequenced GRAM. VP

meta.name: Ice Trek
meta.desc: Para evitar que ocurra otra era del hielo, Vail, el vengador, debe realizar un viaje a traves de las tierras congeladas para llegar al palacio de hielo de Kaltron el Terrible y poner fin a sus maleficos planes de congelar la tierra. Debera es eskiar a travees de Caribou, cruzar el rio congelado y luego hacer frente a los muchos peigros del palacio de hielo para detener a Kaltron. Podra Vail detener una nueva era del hielo?

meta.name: ABPA Backgammon
meta.desc:
Intellivision Backgammon is identical with the board game. Backgammon is a game played by two players (the computer can be one of the players). Each player has 15 pieces. The object of the game is to be the first to move all your pieces completely around and finally off the board. Moving your pieces off the board is called "bearing off". The first player to bear off all his pieces is the winner. Each player moves in a direction beginning from his opponent's Home Table and coming around to his own Home Table. Thus one player always moves clockwise and the other always 
counterclockwise.
You can play against the computer at two skill levels - one for beginners or intermediate, another for experts - or two players can compete against each other. It displays the American Backgammon Players Association (ABPA) logo.

meta.name: Advanced Dungeons and Dragons - Treasure of Tarmin
meta.desc:
The search for treasure leads to high adventure, as you wind through an underground maze of corridors, gates, hidden doors, ladders and rooms. Inside the maze are weapons, magical items, spiritual books,...and the Tarmin treasure! But beware. Within these walls also lurk deadly monsters and horrifying beasts...including the repulsive Minotaur...just waiting for you!
The flashing white dot in the map of the ancient castle tells you where you are and how to get to the Tarmin treasure!
Conquering your way through ever-deeper beast-infested labyrinths, can only lead to the ultimate confrontation - the Minotaur!
A world of challenge for 1 player vs. the computer
4 skill levels. 3-way scoring keeps track of your spiritual and weapon strength. Treasure score keeps track of your wealth.
Monsters and other dreadful creatures keep your heart pounding. Stay alert!
Endless choices to make: which corridor to take, which room to explore, which objects to picks up.
Multi-purpose keys and buttons plus colorful symbols add to the challenge and entertainment.

meta.desc: Persigue la antigua Corona de los Reyes en el juego de Advanced Dungeons & Dragons. Controlas un grupo de tres personas equipadas con tres flechas cada una, aunque puedes encontrar más flechas durante tu búsqueda. Explora el territorio de la Montaña Nublada y adéntrate en cuevas llenas de enemigos que intentarán detener tu progreso. Cuatro niveles de dificultad mantienen el juego fresco y desafiante tanto para expertos como para principiantes.

meta.name: Adventure -AD&D- Cloudy Mountain
meta.desc: Viaja a una tierra de tesoros, aventuras y oscuros peligros. Dirige una expedición de tres hombres a través de sinuosas cuevas montañosas en busca de herramientas y flechas. En estas cavernas te esperan monstruos mortales. Mata a los monstruos, supera los obstáculos de una tierra hostil y entra en la legendaria Montaña de las Nubes. Allí encontrarás la Corona de Reyes... y el terror más mortífero de todos, el Dragón Alado.

meta.name: Air Strike
meta.desc: Estás pilotando un biplano a través del territorio enemigo. Lanza bombas en fábricas y depósitos de municiones. ¡Enfréntate en combates aéreos a muerte contra aviones enemigos! Debido a la popularidad (especialmente entre los programadores de APh y Mattel) del juego de biplanos en el cartucho Triple Action, APh propuso esta versión para un solo jugador. Se mostró a Mattel un prototipo con un terreno montañoso en movimiento y objetivos que podían ser bombardeados. Los gráficos del avión, los efectos de sonido y el control de vuelo se tomaron directamente de Biplanes. (Los aviones enemigos, que habrían representado un desafío de programación de inteligencia artificial, no se incluyeron en el prototipo, pero se prometieron para el juego final). Se lanzó una versión incompleta pero jugable en 1998 en el CD Intellivision Lives!.

meta.name: World Series Major League Baseball
meta.desc:
World Series Major League Baseball es un juego de beisbol que soporta tanto ECS como Intellivoice (para anuncios jugada por jugada). el juego esta basado en estadísticas reales de beisbol (aunque los nombres reales fueron cambiados a ficticios antes de su lanzamiento) y ofrece juegos de beisbol usando múltiples cámaras (incluyendo pantalla dividida durante el juego), mostrando el juego en #D en vez de desplazamiento horizontal.
Soporta 3 jugadores simultáneamente, donde una cámara central es usada para mostrara al pitcher y al bateador. Mientras un jugador escoge el estilo de Pitcheo, el bateador decide si batear o detenerse, entonce las pantalla cambia a una cámara externa para que el jugador que esta en la defensa controle a los jardineros mientras e otro jugador controla a los corredores en las bases, el juego puede ser salvado y cargado a traves de los Chips RAM del cartucho

meta.name: Armor Battle
meta.desc:
It's armored conflict and you command the spearhead! Combat missions galore in this computerized tank battle! Maneuver two tanks through hundreds of different terrains! Battles are waged with a full complement of simulated sound effects to add to the realism!
All-out tank combat! You and your opponent are rival commanders. Each of you must maneuver, lay mines, go for tactical surprise!
A two player game...you and your opponent each have two tanks per battle.
You play your tactics on over hundreds of different battlefield maps!
Assess the battlefield, avoid mines, and move quickly over roads or slowly through fields or water.
Knock out both of your opponent's tanks and win the battle!
Complement of simulated sound and visual effects such as explosions, gunfire, tank engines, much more!

meta.name: Astrosmash
meta.desc:
En Astrosmash, controlas un cañon laser en la base de la pantalla; la meta es ganar la mayor cantidad de puntos posible destrullendo los meteoritos, bombas y otros objetos que van cayendo. Los meteoritos son la amenaza mas comun de la que debes defenderte. Caen en varios colores y tamaños y algunos se dividen en dos partes mas pegueñas cuando les disparas. 
Mezclados con los meteoritos estan las bombas rotatorias. mientras que dejar pasar un meteorito solo baja tu puntaje, debes dispararle a las bombas. si se pasa una perderas una vida. En los niveles mas dificiles Ovnis y misiles dirigidos aparecen ocacionalmente e intentan destruir tu cañon.
Si te encuentras es una situacion desesperada y sin salida, tu cañon entrara en el hiperespacio y sera transportado instantaneamente a otra ubicacion en la pantalla. Pero ten cuidado por que puedes ser transportado a una situacion aun peor. El juego termina cuando todos tus cañones han sido destruidos.

meta.name: Atlantis
meta.desc: ¡La ciudad perdida de Atlántida está bajo ataque! Ola tras ola de naves Gorgon se acercan, cada una armada con armas capaces de destruir una parte de la ciudad. Tú estás a cargo de los puestos de mando en los bordes de la ciudad y debes defenderla de los invasores. Las diferentes naves Gorgon seguirán volando por la pantalla en números variables y en diferentes patrones de vuelo. Al principio vuelan alto en el cielo, pero luego progresivamente más bajo. Si un enemigo llega lo suficientemente bajo antes de que lo destruyas, usará sus armas y destruirá uno de los edificios de Atlántida. A medida que avanzas en el juego, las naves enemigas irán aumentando su velocidad. El juego termina cuando todos los edificios restantes de la ciudad han sido destruidos.

meta.name: Auto Racing
meta.desc: Auto Racing is a one or two player racing game that puts the player behind the wheel of one of five cars, each with different specialties. The player may  race on five different fairly large courses. In the one player game, the player is racing the clock to finish five laps as quickly as possible. In the two player game, the player can race a friend and gain points for either the opponent crashing or if one is leading far enough to reach the edge of the screen.

In the two player game, the player can race a friend and gain points for either the opponent crashing or if one is leading far enough to reach the edge of the screen.

meta.name: B-17 Bomber
meta.desc: B-17 Bomber takes place near the end of World War II. As the pilot of a B-17, your mission is to fly across the English Channel and bomb various strategic targets. First you need to select a destination which features a lot of targets. The further the target is from your home base, the more points you can earn, but with more ground to cover there will be more enemy fighters blocking the target and more fuel will be needed. Once a destination is set, you need to stock your plane with bombs and fuel, then take off! You will now have a first person point of view from the plane and can control which of several views is active. When trying to bomb targets, you will be looking straight down from the bombay doors. When you hear a voice announce incoming enemy planes, you need to switch the view to one of the guns and defend yourself. Lastly you can have a view from the cockpit to control the plane. If your fuel runs low, or your plane takes too much damage, you can fly back to your home base for repairs and then take off again to bomb as many targets as you can!

meta.name: BattleTanks
meta.desc: Get in a tank and fight another player, hiding behind cover as you go. Choose between long-range or short-range bullets, or the ability for the bullets to bounce off objects for a true strategic challenge.

meta.name: BeamRider
meta.desc: Beamrider es un juego de acción arcade en 3-D. Controlas una nave espacial con la misión de limpiar 99 sectores del espacio de alienígenas hostiles. La nave espacial está situada en la parte inferior de la pantalla y sólo puede detenerse en uno de los cinco haces de luz. Estás armado con láseres y torpedos; Los torpedos son más poderosos y pueden destruir más enemigos en comparación con los láseres, sin embargo, solo obtienes tres por nivel. Para completar un sector, debes destruir quince platillos voladores blancos y después el centinela del sector. Cada sector de número par hasta el sector 16 agregará un nuevo tipo de enemigo al que enfrentarse. Estos enemigos adicionales solo intentarán ralentizar tu misión, porque solo es necesario destruir los platillos volantes para avanzar. Ocasionalmente aparecerá un power-up para ganar una vida extra, pero si le disparas accidentalmente se convertirá en un enemigo mas.

meta.name: Beauty and the Beast
meta.desc: En “Beauty and the Beast” encarnas a Colin, un joven que debe desafiar los proyectiles del siniestro Mathias para rescatar a su prometida. Trepa por las ventanas abiertas del edificio, evitando los murciélagos, ratas y cuervos que acechan el antiguo edificio. Afortunadamente, la frágil Adèle le ayuda arrojándole corazones que le aportan una energía extra. Con gráficos agradables y bastante detallados, esta adaptación de “Donkey Kong” es original y divertida.

meta.name: Biplanes
meta.desc: The object of "Biplanes" is to score 15 points by shooting down the balloon or the enemy's biplane. Before the game begins, players can choose between short-range and long-range shots.

meta.name: Blockade Runner
meta.desc: A 3D shoot 'em up. You have to guide a fleet of four merchant space freighters to Earth with vital supplies. Hostile aliens have sighted you and forced you enter a dangerous asteroid belt. And now, you must try to avoid these asteroids, to destroy the Robot mines and alien space ships and also contend with fuel shortages and prevent the deflector shields from over-heating.

p: intellivision TORRENTS/Body Slam! - Super Pro Wrestling (USA).zip.torrent

meta.name: Body Slam: Super Pro Wrestling
meta.desc:
En Body Slam: Super Pro Wrestling, el objetivo es derrotar a tu oponente en el ring. Debes usar fuerza, estrategia y un toque de astucia. Cada combate consiste en una serie de rounds de cuatro minutos. No hay un número limitado de rounds, por lo que el combate continúa hasta que un jugador gane o se declare un empate. El primer luchador que logre mantener a su oponente en el suelo durante 3 segundos será el ganador.
Controlas a un luchador seleccionado entre 12 personajes diferentes. Tu oponente puede ser controlado por otro jugador o por la computadora. Si eliges un combate de equipo, tú y tu oponente controlarán a 2 luchadores que se turnarán en el ring.

meta.name: Bomb Squad
meta.desc:
The terrorist Boris has placed a bomb in the city! As a member of the bomb squad, it is the player's job to disarm the bomb before it explodes. 
Start the game with a view of the code number display which is damaged. In order to find the code which disarms the bomb, the player has to repair the various circuits in order to fix the display. By selecting a square on the code number display, the player will be brought to the corresponding circuit which can be repaired using cutters, pliers, and soldering iron. The player's partner, Frank, will guide through the repairs by telling the player what needs to be done, in what order repairs should be performed, and by helping the player position the tools. Depending on the circuit, the player may need to cut out parts or replace parts (spare parts are located at the top of the screen). If the player use an incorrect replacement part, or perform the repairs in the wrong order, the player will lose time or even cause the bomb to explode. 
On the more difficult skill levels, circuit parts may even overheat and cause a fire; luckily, the player also have a fire extinguisher with you to deal with this situation! When enough circuits have been repaired, the player can decipher the code, enter it into the computer, and the bomb will be disarmed (an incorrect guess will cause it to explode, however). The player may choose to have a one, two, or three digit code to guess and several difficulty levels are available.

meta.name: Boxing
meta.desc:
Two contenders fight themselves for 15 rounds with body punches, feints and hard shots to the head. Victory is decided by the points, assigned by the computer (the referee), otherwise the match ends with a KO. Every round last 1 minute and 30 seconds.
The 2 players can choose their boxer (but not the same) from a rose of six men with different characteristics (speed, offensive power, endurance). The number six is unpredictable.

meta.name: Brickout
meta.desc:
An alien force field has blocked your only means of escape, preventing you from returning home. Your only hope is to use your supply of proton balls to try and destroy the field, one block at a time. Use your deflector to bounce proton balls against descending rows of energy layers. When a ball contacts the force field, it will neutralize that part of the barrier. But just when you think you're making some headway, more layers appear to seal you in. Just how much damage can you do to the force field before running out of proton balls?
Features
A one player action game.
Blast your way through the mysterious force field.
Take control and rack up a huge score!
Wave after wave to blast through!
Stay focused as endless layers descend upon you.

meta.name: Bump 'n' Jump
meta.desc: Bump 'N' Jump es un juego de carreras y acción que se juega desde una vista superior. Mientras corres por las peligrosas y siempre cambiantes carreteras, numerosos autos enemigos intentarán sacarte de la ruta. Debes asegurarte de chocar a los autos y apartarlos del camino antes de que te choquen y te estrelles contra los costados. Tu auto también tiene la capacidad de saltar muy alto si tienes suficiente velocidad. Esto es útil para saltar sobre los autos enemigos si hay demasiados en el camino, y también se debe utilizar para saltar huecos en la carretera y otros obstáculos en la autopista. A medida que los niveles avanzan, la carretera se estrecha con más obstáculos en el camino y los otros autos aumentan en número y agresividad.

meta.name: Burgertime
meta.desc:
Nuestro protagonista es Chef Pepper y su objetivo es hacer hamburguesas mientras huevos, salchichas y pepinillos malvados le persiguen por el área de juego.
Para hacer una hamburguesa debes reunir todos los ingredientes y dejarlos caer desde arriba hasta el área de la hamburguesa que se encuentra abajo. Chef Pepper debe pasar por todos los ingredientes de la hamburguesa. Tan pronto como pise un ingrediente (un trozo de lechuga, por ejemplo), caerá al siguiente nivel. La comida que caiga aplastará a cualquier enemigo que te siga y también golpeará cualquier otro ingrediente que se encuentre debajo. Como defensa puedes recolectar pimenteros que te permitirán expulsar una pequeña nube de pimienta que aturdirá momentáneamente a los enemigos, permitiéndote pasar junto a ellos sin recibir daño.
Conforme avances de nivel los enemigos serán más rápidos y habrá más ingredientes para montar tu hamburguesa.

meta.name: Buzz Bombers
meta.desc: Buzz Bombers is an arcade action game similar to Centipede. You control a can of bug spray at the bottom of the screen, and you need to defend yourself from the swarms of incoming bees. The bees start at the top of the screen, and fly their way back and forth, slowly heading towards the bottom of the screen. If they reach the ground, they will pollinate the flowers there which causes them to grow and will restrict movement of your spray can. When you shoot a bee, it will turn into a honeycomb. The honeycombs will cause the bees to head towards the ground even faster, since they will turn around when one is in their way. Your spray can is able to shoot the honeycombs, but if you leave them in place a hummingbird will fly around and eat the honey from them. The more honey the hummingbird eats, the more points you get. The game ends when all of your spray cans are destroyed by growing flowers.

meta.name: Carnival
meta.desc: You are at the carnival, and are going to take a chance at the shooting gallery! Your goal is to earn as many points as possible by shooting the various targets before you run out of bullets. In addition to the assorted targets that float by, there are boxes which can be shot to earn additional bullets. You also need to be careful of the ducks! From time to time, a duck will fly down and eat some of your bullets if you don't shoot it first. You move on to the next round of gameplay when the rack has been cleared of all the targets, and the game ends when you use up all of your bullets.

meta.name: Centipede
meta.desc:
GET OUT YOUR BUG BLASTER AND SAVE THAT FUNGUS!
THE THRILL OF THE ARCADE GAME
An insidious invasion of multiplying insects (centipedes, jumping spiders, poisonous scorpions, and frenzied fleas) pose different perils to the mushroom patch. You must repeatedly blast enraged creepers and stubborn obstacles or lose your enchanted fungus. Remember to listen for the distinctive sounds of the attacking bugs; and watch out for blasted centipede segments, for each one grows a new head!

meta.name: Championship Tennis
meta.desc: Se puede jugar solo, contra la computadora o con otro jugador, ya sea en individuales o en dobles. Incluso se puede jugar COM VS COM  y sólo mirar.Conquiste París, Nueva York y Wimbledon.necesitaras gran concentración y piernas fuertes para ganar en el Campeonato de Tenis. juega en Flushing Meadows, Roland Garros o Wimbledon.  A ver si tienes lo que se necesita para ganar el "Grand Slam"!.

meta.name: Checkers
meta.desc:
Challenge Tradition! Beat a friend electronically for practice. Then go for it against the Ultimate Checker Player - a Wiley computer who asks and gives no quarter.
- Two ways to play, vs. a friend or the ultimate competitor, the canny computer.
- HI and LO skill levels when playing the computer. Added difficulty... added excitement.
- "Bail Out" button - COMPUTER SUGGESTS MOVE, when you're stumped against the computer.
- Simulated sound effects - BELLS, BUZZERS, A BRONX CHEER and a VICTORY TUNE.
- No time limit on moves!
- CLEAR button that lets you change your move!

p: intellivision TORRENTS/Chip Shot - Super Pro Golf (USA).zip.torrent

meta.name: Chip Shot: Super Pro Golf
meta.desc:
Welcome to the 17th hole at Pebble Beach! In this golf game, you'll experience the thrill and challenges of playing on 99 different holes, each with its own unique obstacles such as trees, sand traps, and water hazards. Before teeing off, you'll need to select your club and consider the direction of the wind. Will you be able to navigate around that tree?
Address the ball, bring back the club, and swing with a resounding THWACK! But oh no, your shot has landed in the rough. It's a difficult lie, but fear not. Pull out your trusty wedge, take a swing, and chip the ball onto the green. Now it's time for the all-important putt. Pay close attention to the flag as it will help you gauge the direction and speed of the wind. Take into account the break of the green as you line up your putt. Sink it in for a satisfying par!

meta.name: Commando
meta.desc:
TO: COMMANDO
FROM: COL N.K. NEWCOMBE
MISSION: CAPTURE ENEMY FORTRESS
This mission is TOP SECRET. We have to send you in ALONE against wave after wave of enemy soldiers. We can offer NO SUPPORT, except to give you a MACHINE GUN, a limited number of HAND GRENADES, and some advice:
- Keep moving! You will be under CONSTANT FIRE!
- Watch out for enemies in TRENCHES, behind BARRICADES, and on MOTORCYCLES!
- Different enemies require different strategies to defeat!
- Capture enemy stores of HAND GRENADES as you advance!
- Rescue prisoners of war!
Stay cool and maybe, just maybe, you can beat the odds. And if you succeed, we have another mission for you, TOUGHER THAN BEFORE...

meta.name: Congo Bongo
meta.desc: You're on a jungle safari packed full of wild and zany adventures. Climb the cliffs to the top of Monkey Mountain as you try to reach the jungle's most mischievous gorilla. Don't get clobbered by the coconuts he'll throw your way. Watch out for menacing monkeys. Beyond Monkey Mountain you'll come to Lazy Lake where you'll see raging rhinos and hollering hippos. Leap from lily pad to lily pad across the treacherous lake filled with ferocious man-eating fish and other jungle dangers, but be care... one slip and it's safari heaven!

meta.name: Crazy Clones
meta.desc:
In Crazy Clones, you are the one real person in a sea of clones. You must tag as many clones as possible while avoiding the Clone Master. When the Clone Master touches a clone, a new clone is produced. When the Clone Master touches you, the game is over.
Note: If you tag all of the clones without letting the Clone Master create a new clone, you're hosed.

meta.name: TRON - Deadly Discs - Deadly Dogs
meta.desc: The game is a cross between Burgertime and Tron: Deadly Discs. In this version you control the hot dog from Burgertime in the Tron arena.

meta.name: Deep Pockets: Super Pro Pool & Billiards
meta.desc: Puede aprender muchos juegos de billar de bolsillo y de carambola en la privacidad y comodidad de su propio hogar, y repasar las reglas y la estrategia antes de aventurarse.

meta.name: Defender
meta.desc: Landers, Bombers, Baiters, Pods y Swarmers. El ataque alienígena ha llegado y la derrota a manos de invasores desquiciados amenaza a los humanoides. Su única esperanza es la nave espacial, Defender. Armado con bombas inteligentes y capaz de entrar en el hiperespacio, Defender iguala la balanza, pero se convierte en el objetivo de otro vil ataque: ¡los humanoides secuestrados transformados en mutantes asesinos!

meta.name: Demon Attack
meta.desc:
Oleadas de demonios rodean la superficie lunar y bombardean el último puesto avanzado de la Tierra, la estación lunar Tranquility. Usa tu cañón láser para destruirlos; de lo contrario, devastarán la tierra. Resiste su ataque con bombas, dispara contra sus filas y aplasta su ataque.
¡Entonces pasa a la ofensiva! Despega de la superficie lunar y lucha contra la base del demonio alienígena. Elimina el escudo parpadeante. Defiéndete de las patrullas suicidas que corren hacia ti. Coloca un tiro directamente a través de la ventana giratoria hacia el núcleo de la base enemiga y consigue la victoria.

meta.name: Dig Dug
meta.desc:
En Dig Dug, libra una guerra subterránea con tu fiel arpón. Tendrás que derrotar al duro Pooka y al feroz Fygar para avanzar al siguiente nivel.
Haz explotar a tus enemigos para que revienten o lánzales rocas. Conseguirás puntos por deshacerte de ellos o por recoger objetos de bonificación.
Este juego clásico es a la vez un juego de acción arcade de la vieja escuela y un juego de estrategia. ¡Atrae a tus enemigos hacia donde quieras que estén y aplástalos con las rocas!

meta.name: Diner
meta.desc:
In this unofficial sequel to the arcade game BurgerTime, the Rotten Foods (Hot Dogs, Cherries, Bananas, and their leader Mugsy, the Mug o' Root Beer) have thrown lunch all over the diner and Peter Pepper has to get it back on the plate. 
The game is for 1 or 2 players (but in this case they have to choose two different difficulty levels). Peter Pepper must kick the Food Balls (red Meatballs, green Lettuce Heads, white Rice, tan Mashed Potatoes, and yellow Macaroni) scattered throughout the diner. The Food Ball will roll across the floor, down ramps, and over ledges. If it's close enough to the bottom of the screen, it will roll right onto the plate.
When a plate is full, Side Orders appear in the diner: if Peter picks them up, he earns 250 points and 1 pepper. When he fills 4 plates (finish four game screens), he enters the Blue Plate Special bonus round: Food Balls start raining across the screen and Peter can eat all them, but the flashing ones, for extra points.
With them he can squish the Rotten Food too, earning extra points. He can shake pepper to stop them momentarily or simply run away. If a Rotten Food touch him, he loses a turn. Peter can obtain a new turn every 20.000 points. If he run out of turns the game ends.

meta.name: Donkey Kong
meta.desc: En Donkey Kong, Mario debe rescatar a una damisela en apuros, Lady, de un gigantesco simio llamado Donkey Kong. El héroe y el simio se convirtieron más tarde en dos de los personajes más populares de Nintendo. El juego se divide en cuatro etapas diferentes de una sola pantalla. Cada una representa 25 metros de la estructura que Donkey Kong ha escalado, siendo cada etapa 25 metros más alta que la anterior. La pantalla final ocurre a los 100 metros.

meta.name: Donkey Kong Jr.
meta.desc: Donkey Kong Jr. was originally released in the arcades in 1982 as a sequel to Donkey Kong.

meta.name: Dracula
meta.desc: As the sun sets, Dracula rises, hungry for the blood of fresh victims.  As Dracula, the goal of this game is to stalk the streets at night, feeding on people walking the streets, or by luring them out of their homes.  As Dracula bites his victims, his actions will call the attention of the local constable who will try to slow him down by driving a stake into him.  Dracula can respond by either turning one of his victims into zombies to attack the police, or by transforming into a bat to escape capture.  Even the forces of nature are against the vampire, as wolves will attack him on foot, and hawks will drag away his bat form.  Dracula must feed on a certain number of victims and return to his tomb before sunrise, or he will not survive to feed another night.

meta.name: Dragonfire
meta.desc: ¡Los tesoros del rey han sido robados! Como joven y audaz príncipe, tu objetivo es recuperarlos a todos. Los tesoros se guardan en diferentes castillos, cada uno custodiado por un dragón de fuego. Cada nivel del juego tiene dos partes, primero tienes que cruzar el puente levadizo del castillo. ¡Tendrás que saltar y esquivar las bolas de fuego de los dragones y evitar las flechas voladoras para llegar al otro lado! En la segunda parte, tienes que recoger todos los tesoros de la pantalla y ponerlos en un lugar seguro mientras evitas al dragón que corre por la parte inferior de la pantalla. Los dragones de cada nivel tienen diferentes patrones de movimiento y disparo, y a medida que avanzan los niveles se vuelven más rápidos y complicados.

meta.name: The Dreadnaught Factor
meta.desc: The Zorban Dreadnaughts are spaceships that are 140,000 feet long and weigh 970 megatons, making them the largest, most heavily armoured spaceships ever created. A fleet of these large battlecraft are now heading towards your home planet, and it is your job to stop them! The game is played from a side scrolling overhead point of view as your small but agile spaceship flies past the dreadnaughts. On each pass your spaceship makes, you need to try and bomb as many of the energy vents as possible. When all energy vents on a dreadnaught are destroyed, that dreadnaught will explode. Time is limited, though, and if you make too many passes to destroy the energy vents the dreadnaught will be within firing range of your home planet and will destroy it. Each of the dreadnaughts are heavily armed; guns, canons, missiles, and other weapons are located on each dreadnaught and will be trying their best to end your mission. Multiple skill levels are included which alter the number of dreadnaughts you must destroy, as well as their speed and firing capabilities.

meta.name: Thin Ice
meta.desc:
Duncan es un pingüino al que le encanta patinar sobre hielo fino. Mientras Duncan patina, corta el hielo del suelo; si patina completamente alrededor de otro pingüino el hielo se rompe y el pingüino cae al agua helada. Duncan sólo tiene dos preocupaciones: la foca a la que le encanta hacerle rebotar con la nariz y los ​​osos polares a los que les gusta golpearlo.
Controlas a Duncan que debe patinar alrededor de los otros pingüinos para que caigan al agua mientras evitas a los osos y a las focas. Devora cócteles de camarones para aumentar la velocidad. Una vez has conseguido echar al agua todos los pingüinos, aparecen más y el juego continúa en el siguiente nivel, ¡más difícil que antes!

You are a gorilla sitting at an adding machine. A number appears above you. This is the TARGET NUMBER. Below you appear several WHITE numbers (how many depends on the difficulty level). Your task is to add, subtract, multiply, and divide the white numbers to reach the Target Number.

meta.name: Fathom
meta.desc: Neptina, Neptune's daughter, has been imprisoned at the bottom of the sea by Titans. Your goal is to rescue her by locating the scattered pieces of a magical trident! You will need to take the form of a dolphin and a bird in order to locate the pieces that are hidden in the ocean and clouds. When flying in the air, there are several screens that have clouds flying by. Touch all of the clouds, and the trident piece appears! Other birds which are flying around will cause you to lose energy if you touch them accidentally. Underwater, trident pieces can be found by touching the sea horses. Octopuses, sharks, and a deadly maze of seaweed will get in your way and cause you to lose energy if caught! When you have located all of the trident pieces, the cage holding Neptina can be unlocked, but if you run out of energy first the game will be over.

meta.name: Frog Bog
meta.desc: You control one of two frogs sitting on a lily pad in a bog. The object of the game is to eat as many flies as you can in the three minute time limit. Your frog can jump back and forth between the two lily pads in order to catch the flies that go by overhead. When jumping, be careful not to fall in the water or your frog will have to swim back to the lily pad which can waste time. The game can be played during the day, or at night making it more difficult to see the flies. At the end of the time limit, whichever player has eaten more flies wins! One player can compete against a computer controlled frog, or two players against each other.

meta.name: Frogger
meta.desc:
Your task in this arcade conversion is to guide a frog across a treacherous road and river, and to safety at the top of the screen. Both these sections are fraught with a variety of hazards, each of which will kill the frog and cost you a life if contact is made.
The road is full of cars and trucks, at variable speeds. The river water itself is fatal, as are the snakes which hover within on later levels. Frogger must use the arrangement of logs, turtles (which are only there for a short time) and alligators (but stay away form their faces), and then jump into one of the open home-cells, ideally one containing a fly for extra points. Once all holes have been filled, you move onto the next, harder, level.

meta.name: Game Factory
meta.desc: Ahora puedes crear tus propios videojuegos sin tener que hacer todo el trabajo. Nuestro Game Maker viene con los gráficos y la jugabilidad ya diseñados para ti. Puedes elegir de una biblioteca de personajes, fondos y jugabilidad, y luego crear tu propio videojuego personalizado. ¡Incluso puedes conectar cualquier cartucho regular de Intellivision al sistema para usar tus personajes favoritos de Intellivision!

meta.name: Go For The Gold
meta.desc: Un cartucho no lanzado con cuatro juegos previamente lanzados con licencia de los Juegos Olímpicos de Sarajevo 1984. Los juegos incluirían Esquí, Hockey, Boxeo y Baloncesto. En 1998, la pantalla de menú del prototipo se incluyó en el CD Intellivision Lives!

meta.name: Grid Shock
meta.desc: An arcade game. Carom your shots against the moving wall to fill in the pattern on the back grid.

meta.name: Easter Eggs
meta.desc: The Design & Development department created a "Happy Holidays" cartridge to demonstrate pagable roms.  Demo screens and some simple animations created.

meta.name: Happy Holidays: Santa's Helper
meta.desc: An album of three holiday-themed games: Santa's Helper. Find and gather all the toys and gifts. Find the elf for extra points. Get all the gifts and join Santa in his sleigh. Drop gifts down chimneys as they scroll past below the sleigh. Easter Eggcitement. Find the Easter eggs hidden in the park. Find the Easter Bunny for extra points. Trick or Treat. Go trick-or-treating; get candy from houses where the lights are on. Avoid the witches, ghosts and pumpkins.
