meta.name: ZZZ(notgame):Halloween Street
meta.desc: Small demo included in Intellivision Lives! CD.

meta.name: Happy Trails
meta.desc: Happy Trails is an action strategy game for one or two players. Black Bart has robbed the stagecoach, and you need to recover all of the stolen money within the given time limit! The money is located in various locations in a series of maze-like paths. The paths are broken up into tiles, and there is one tile missing so you can rearrange the maze by moving a tile into the empty space. As your character walks through the paths, you need to rearrange the tiles to make sure there is always a connected path in front of him (or you'll lose a life) and to guide him towards the money bags. When all of the money has been recovered, you move on to the next round. On the more difficult rounds, Black Bart will also be wandering around the maze trying to stop you! You should avoid him at all costs, unless you have first collected a star which gives your character temporary invincibility.

meta.name: Horse Racing
meta.desc:
This game is for 1 up to 6 players. When the game begins, you can place the bets, for the winner or  for the first and second place. Then you can choose if an horse must be driven by a player or by the CPU. Only the third and the fourth horse can be driven by the players. There are 3 types of terrain: turf, mud or dry. 
When the race begins, the horses are speedier at the beginning, slower toward the end. They are different for speed at the starting gate, stamina, speed at the straight line, and for speed with different conditions of the race terrain. You (and the CPU too!) have the whip and the coax to spur a horse, and these tools could be useful to win a race even with a more tired horse.

meta.name: Hover Force
meta.desc:
Las fuerzas terroristas han tomado el control de la ciudad isleña de New Seeburg. Están equipados con helicópteros de combate fuertemente armados, por lo que la única forma de combatirlos es en el aire. El jugador pilota el helicóptero ultrasecreto JAF-3000 y debe destruir a los enemigos con los cañones láser y apagar los incendios con los cañones de agua. También hay una pantalla de radar que muestra todos los daños causados por los terroristas, los incendios extinguidos y los enemigos derribados.
Los ataques de los terroristas pueden dañar el motor, el sistema de navegación, los cañones y el radar. El jugador puede regresar a la base principal (Force Island) para reparaciones y reabastecimiento, pero solo dos veces por misión (la tercera vez después de eliminar a todos los enemigos). El juego, para un jugador, termina si el helicóptero se estrella.

meta.name: Hypnotic Lights
meta.desc: DEVELOPMENT HISTORY While experimenting with Intellivision graphics, someone in the Design & Development department came up with a kaleidoscopic effect using sequenced GRAM. VP

meta.name: Ice Trek
meta.desc: Para evitar que ocurra otra era del hielo, Vail, el vengador, debe realizar un viaje a traves de las tierras congeladas para llegar al palacio de hielo de Kaltron el Terrible y poner fin a sus maleficos planes de congelar la tierra. Debera es eskiar a travees de Caribou, cruzar el rio congelado y luego hacer frente a los muchos peigros del palacio de hielo para detener a Kaltron. Podra Vail detener una nueva era del hielo?

meta.name: Illusions
meta.desc: Prepare yourself for a journey into a most unusual fantasy. A kingdom where nothing is as it seems. A land where the usual is unusual. Take a good look--then look again. It's a place. It's a time. It's a state of mind. Illusions -- it's all done with mirrors!

p: intellivision TORRENTS/Jetsons' Ways with Words, The (USA).zip.torrent

meta.name: The Jetsons' Ways With Words
meta.desc: ¡Aprende ortografía y la lectura en el universo "Jetsons" de Hanna-Barbera! Vuela la nave espacial de George Jetson alrededor de una red de plataformas para recoger las letras que forman una palabra. Las cartas se desplazan alrededor de la red, e incluso tratarán de alejarse de su nave espacial cuando se acerque. Cuando toca la letra correcta en el orden correcto, gana puntos, pero toca una letra que no pertenece y los pierdes. Si recoge cartas fuera de servicio no gana tantos puntos. En los niveles superiores también tienes que esquivar robots y satélites, que cuestan más puntos si los golpeas

meta.name: King Of The Mountain
meta.desc: Manage your supplies and make it to the top alive.  The unfinished but playable version was released on the Intellivision Lives! CD in 1998 by Intellivision Productions.

meta.name: Kool-aid Man
meta.desc:
¡Dos niños están atrapados en una casa embrujada llena de malvados Thirsties! Guía a los niños a través de la casa para encontrar todos los ingredientes para hacer un lote de Kool-Aid.
Inicialmente, los niños se mueven juntos por la casa, pero si uno de los niños es atacado por un Thirsty vagabundo, los niños se separan y ahora se controlan uno a la vez. Si un niño es atacado dos veces, ese niño está fuera del juego. Si ambos niños son atacados dos veces, el juego termina.
Una vez que se colocan todos los ingredientes para Kool-Aid (azúcar, Kool-Aid y una jarra) cerca del fregadero de la cocina, ¡aparece Kool-Aid Man y ahora es controlado por el jugador! Usa a Kool-Aid Man para recolectar frutas vagabundas y destruir a los Thirsties. Una vez que los Thirsties han sido derrotados, la ronda termina y el juego comienza de nuevo con un nivel de dificultad más alto (a menos que se haya seleccionado el modo "kiddy" al iniciar el juego).
Kool-Aid Man es para 1 jugador y ofrece 13 niveles de dificultad, incluyendo un modo para niños que nunca aumenta la dificultad durante el juego.

meta.name: Lady Bug
meta.desc:
En este emocionante juego de acción inspirado en Pac-Man, los jugadores asumen el control de una valiente mariquita que se aventura a través de intrincados laberintos en busca de deliciosos pellets de comida "x". Sin embargo, no será tarea fácil, ya que el laberinto está lleno de desafíos y peligros. Además de las paredes habituales, hay puertas giratorias estratégicas que se pueden utilizar para atrapar a los enemigos y escapar de situaciones complicadas.
Cada laberinto alberga un nido de insectos enemigos en su centro, desde donde surgen criaturas hostiles periódicamente. La clave para sobrevivir radica en aprovechar al máximo los poderes especiales y las oportunidades tácticas. Los jugadores pueden recolectar power-ups, como el veneno, que es letal tanto para ellos como para los enemigos. Al atraer a los enemigos hacia el veneno, pueden eliminarlos y eliminarlos del juego, lo que facilita la exploración del laberinto.

meta.name: Land Battle
meta.desc:
Land Battle is a two player war game which utilizes both strategic and tactical modes of play. Each player controls an array of forces with the objective of capturing or destroying his opponent's "flag."
The game can be played on any of thousands of different countryside maps -- the first thousand of which are selectable at the beginning of the game. All of these maps show roads, towns, hills, lakes, forests, orchards, and fields, and these geographic features impose restrictions and necessitate clever planning on the part of the player.

meta.name: Las Vegas Blackjack And Poker
meta.desc: Las Vegas Poker & Blackjack is a computerized version of different types of Poker and Blackjack, including 7-Card Stud and 5-Card Draw. The player inputs how much "money" that is available to bet with. There is one and two-player games, and Las Vegas Poker & Blackjack includes a dealer to play against.

meta.name: Las Vegas Roulette
meta.desc: Implements Las Vegas style roulette game. Most of the screen consists of the standard Las Vegas roulette betting table, and a moving strip on the top with wheel numbers on it represents the roulette wheel. Place your bets on the betting table, and spin the wheel. The game calculates your wins and losses.

meta.name: League Of Light
meta.desc:
Maneuver down an abstract tunnel of colored light without crashing. Succeed and go on to a musical memory game: notes are randomly played that you must then play back using the hand controller keypad. Score points for how quickly you duplicate the series of notes. Then its back into the tunnel and on to a longer series of notes in the memory game.
Russ Lieblich did the sounds and music for a number of games at Mattel Electronics (including Snafu) before going to Activision where he designed this game. Peter Kaminski, who programmed River Raid, helped Russ with the programming.  It was finally released on the Intellivision Rocks! CD.

meta.name: Lock 'n' Chase
meta.desc: Lock 'n' Chase es un juego arcade de acción similar a Pac-Man. Juegas como un ladrón atrapado en un laberinto. Para salir, debes recolectar el oro ubicado en el laberinto. Tu tarea no será fácil porque hay cuatro policías que constantemente intentan atraparte a lo largo del laberinto. A medida que avanzas por el laberinto, tienes la opción de cerrar temporalmente una puerta para intentar bloquear a la policía. Sólo puedes cerrar dos puertas a la vez y todas las puertas cerradas se abren automáticamente al cabo de un breve periodo de tiempo. Cuando hayas recogido todo el oro del laberinto, la salida se abrirá automáticamente y podrás escapar y pasar al siguiente nivel. De vez en cuando, aparecerá un elemento de bonificación en el laberinto, como una bolsa de dinero, una corona o un maletín, que se puede recoger para ganar aún más puntos.

meta.name: Loco-motion
meta.desc:
Basado en un juego de arcade de 1982, Loco-Motion es un juego de rompecabezas en el que un tren se desplaza sobre una cuadrícula de piezas de vía móviles. El objetivo es guiar al tren a través de las estaciones de tren ubicadas alrededor del borde del campo de juego. Una sección vacía en la cuadrícula permite al jugador desplazar las piezas de vía adyacentes a esa sección para modificar el camino del tren, y una luz de trazado muestra el camino que sigue el tren a medida que se mueve. Un botón de aceleración mueve el tren más rápidamente en su camino, y un botón de pánico intercambia la pieza de vía en la que se encuentra el tren con una pieza de vía aleatoria en la cuadrícula.
Un temporizador de bonificación va disminuyendo durante el juego, mostrando cuántos puntos se recibirán si el tren llega a una estación a tiempo. Si el temporizador llega a cero, "Crazy Trains" y "Loop Sweepers" aparecerán y correrán por la vía en un intento de chocar con tu tren. Otros obstáculos incluyen "Crazy Tracks" que pueden enviar tu tren en otra dirección y estaciones explosivas (que ocurren ocasionalmente si el temporizador de bonificación llega a cero).

meta.name: Magic Carousel
meta.desc: A children's educational game for the Intellivoice.  Identify animals on a carousel and follow Instructions given throughout the game.  Score points by doing what the voices tell you.  Unreleased until the Intellivision Rocks CD in 2001.

meta.name: Magic Carousel
meta.desc: A children's educational game for the Intellivoice.  Identify animals on a carousel and follow Instructions given throughout the game.  Score points by doing what the voices tell you.  Unreleased until the Intellivision Rocks CD in 2001.

meta.name: Baseball
meta.desc:
Major League Baseball is an action baseball game for two players. The game follows most professional baseball rules and allows you to control all of the players on the team. You can throw a variety of pitches (from curve balls to fast balls), steal bases, tag players out, bunt, try for a home run, and in the event of a tie the game goes into extra innings! Several difficulty levels are available which control the game speed and whether or not stealing bases is allowed.
The game was rereleased as "Big League Baseball" by INTV. Sears sold it under the more generic name of "Baseball."

meta.name: Masters of the Universe: The Power of He-Man
meta.desc: In Masters of the Universe, you control He-Man as he battles Skeletor in two different types of arcade action scenes. In the first part of the game, you control the Wind Raider flying towards Castle Grayskull. You have a limited amount of fuel with which to reach your destination, plus numerous fireballs will be flying around the screen trying to stop you and Skeletor will be running along the ground. The Wind Raider is equipped with bombs and guns which can be used to defend yourself from the fireballs, and also can earn bonus points if you can hit Skeletor. The second part of the game takes place on foot. When you've landed near the castle, He-Man needs to pursue Skeletor. Skeletor will be firing numerous lightning bolts which can be blocked with a shield. There is a time limit here, and you must get past all of the screens and catch Skeletor before time runs out. If you are successful, the game will repeat at a tougher skill level.

meta.desc: Astrosmash fue originalmente concevido cuando un juego llamado Meteor!, un clon de Asteroids, no entraba entero en un cartucho. La habitación extra fue usada para crear la variante del juego

meta.name: Microsurgeon
meta.desc: You're a microsurgeon, and your patient is in critical condition! First you need to examine the patient's medical chart to find out what's wrong, and which conditions are the most critical. Now to save the patient, you control a robot probe which can be used to administer aspirin, antiseptic, or ultrasonics to clear up the problem. You should clear up the most critical conditions first, then move on to the less serious areas to ensure your patient survives. Your probe should navigate through the veins, arteries, and lymph; if you guide the probe outside these areas, it's movement will slow down and swarms of white blood cells will attack it, depleting the limited energy supply. There are 197 different patients you need to help, each with different ailments.

meta.name: Mind Strike!
meta.desc: ¡Qué divertido! ¡Una experiencia emocionante que se puede jugar de forma lenta, utilizando turnos alternativos, o rápida, con ambos jugadores enganchados simultáneamente al objetivo supremo de conquistar el castillo del otro! Jugándolo de forma lenta se llama MIND STRIKE, y requiere bastante pensamiento estratégico. Jugándolo rápido se llama SPEED STRIKE, ¡y es un deslumbrante juego que combina acción con estrategia! Elige hasta 50 tableros de juego o diseña el tuyo propio. Programa el nivel de habilidad del oponente de la computadora (a tu favor o al suyo). Participa en confrontaciones tentadoras. Combina tus piezas para obtener mayor fuerza o sepáralas para moverte más lejos. ¡Hazlo tan salvaje o tan absorbente como tu mente te permita!

meta.name: Minotaur
meta.desc: Has encontrado el mapa secreto de la guarida subterránea del temido Minotauro. Puedes entrar, pero nunca saldrás a menos que mates al Minotauro y reclames su tesoro de Tarmin. Mientras te abres paso por pasillos y cámaras, los monstruos empuñan sus armas convencionales o espirituales. Debes recolectar las defensas adecuadas en el camino. Pero úsalas con moderación, ¡el Minotauro se acerca cada vez más!

meta.name: Mission-x
meta.desc: Mission X es un juego de disparos de desplazamiento vertical que se juega desde una perspectiva de arriba hacia abajo. Eres el piloto de un avión de la Segunda Guerra Mundial en una misión para destruir la mayor cantidad de objetivos enemigos posible. Tus misiones se llevarán a cabo sobre tierra y mar, y pueden tener lugar durante el día o la noche. Intenta ganar la mayor cantidad de puntos posible lanzando bombas sobre los objetivos terrestres, que incluyen puentes, tanques, trenes, barcos y más. El enemigo hará todo lo posible para detenerte y enviará grandes cantidades de tanques, misiles antiaéreos y aviones para intentar destruirte.

meta.name: Motocross
meta.desc: Motocross is a bike racing game for one player against the clock, one player against the computer, or two players. Included are three different racetracks of varying lengths, each with many twists, turns, and even some jumps. Be careful when racing or you could skid off the track on a sharp turn or crash after a poorly timed jump! You can also use the track editor to create your own track to race on. For each race you can choose anywhere from one to ten laps to be completed.

meta.desc: An update of U.S. Ski Team Skiing, Mountain Madness: Super Pro Skiing includes code from that game, but offers new features such as enhanced graphics, create-your-own course, and random skiing, which has a helicopter dropping players off on uncharted mountains.

meta.name: Mouse Trap
meta.desc: Mouse Trap es un juego de acción arcade similar a Pac-Man. Controlas a un ratón en un laberinto y tu objetivo es comer todos los trozos de queso para obtener puntos y pasar al siguiente laberinto. Vagando por el laberinto hay varios gatos que intentan atraparte. Tu ratón tiene la capacidad de convertirse temporalmente en un perro y perseguir a los gatos. Sin embargo, para hacerlo, necesitará comer los huesos de perro que se encuentran en todo el laberinto. El laberinto también contiene numerosas puertas. El ratón puede mover estas puertas para reconfigurar el laberinto e intentar superar a los gatos.

meta.name: Mr. Basic Meets Bits 'n Bytes
meta.desc: An introduction to computers and BASIC programming through the fun of a video game. Control "Mr. BASIC" and capture the "Bits" and "Bytes" in one of three exciting games. Learn to write simple programs on the Computer Keyboard. Or, use the hand controllers just for fun. These programs use our unique color-coded graphics system to make learning programming as easy as a game.

meta.name: Nasl Soccer
meta.desc: NASL Soccer is an action soccer game for two players. The game follows typical soccer rules; attempt to score more goals than your opponent in the two 45 minute periods (this is in simulated time). You control one player on your team at a time while the computer takes control of the rest. The game allows you to dribble and pass, and features throw ins, corner kicks, goal kicks, and in the event of a tie the game goes in to overtime! Several skill levels are available which control the speed of the game.

meta.name: Nba Basketball
meta.desc:
NBA Basketball is an early, very basic basketball game.  While officially licensed by the NBA, the game contains no team names or players to speak of.  There are only two teams, a Home team and a Visitor team.  The Home team is red and the Visitor team is green.  
The game is shown from a side-court angle with team baskets on the left and right sides of the screen.  Characters animate when running, and when dribbling the basketball.  The "floor" does have basic basketball set-up including the center line and free throw lines.  
NBA Basketball is a two-player (only) game and features four quarters, passing, blocking and jump shots.  There is even overtime should it become necessary.
The title screen says only "Basketball," but the box and game cartridge have the NBA emblem and "NBA Basketball" printed on them.

meta.name: Nfl Football
meta.desc: NFL Football contains almost all the elements of a real football game. The game consists of four quarters, fifteen minutes each. There are four difficulty levels; high school, college, semi-pro, and pro. There are nine different plays to call, including running plays, field goals, passing plays, and punting. The only thing that's not realistic about NFL Football is the teams only have five players on offense and on defense.

meta.name: Nhl Hockey
meta.desc: NHL Hockey es un juego de hockey de acción para dos jugadores en la consola Intellivision. Los jugadores controlan al manipulador del puck de su equipo, mientras que la CPU controla a todos los demás miembros del equipo, incluido el portero. Los jugadores pueden disparar rápidamente el puck o pasarlo lentamente, y también pueden derribar a otros jugadores (con el riesgo de una penalización si no tienen el puck). Durante el juego, también es posible robar el puck e interceptar disparos. NHL Hockey ofrece 4 configuraciones de velocidad diferentes, seleccionables al comienzo del juego.

meta.name: Night Stalker
meta.desc: En Night Stalker, robots, murciélagos y arañas te persiguen en un laberinto, ofreciendo una jugabilidad similar, aunque más lenta, al éxito arcade Berzerk. Los jugadores deben recoger un arma que se coloca aleatoriamente en el laberinto. El arma proporciona al jugador un número determinado de disparos. Una vez agotado, el arma vuelve a colocarse en una parte aleatoria del laberinto.

meta.name: Nova Blast
meta.desc: Debes defender 4 ciudades fortificadas contra invasores que atacan tanto por aire como por tierra. Cada ciudad tiene un escudo que puede recibir un disparo. El jugador controla una nave que puede disparar láseres horizontalmente y lanzar bombas verticalmente. La nave también está equipada con un rayo de energía que puede absorber la energía de los tanques y utilizar esta energía para crear escudos temporales alrededor de las ciudades desprotegidas.Si las 4 ciudades son destruidas o la nave es alcanzada 10 veces en un turno, el juego termina.

meta.name: Number Jumble
meta.desc:
Cut across fire in a Time Sailer, cruise under water in a Submarine, fly through thin air in a Zeppelin, or roll across the Earth in a Tank -- but never stop firing at the dreadful creatures that beset you! Shoot them down with the fireballs you control and they'll turn into black numbers. When you shoot enough creatures, you get a chance to solve exciting mathematical equations...and score big points! Hurry, for every second counts! Have fun!
    1 or 2 players. 1 little man under your control when the game starts, 4 more in reserve. 4 different environments to choose from!
    Simple to more complex equations. Both "scratch pad" and "solution" areas to work on. Choose from 48 skill levels.
    Transport Houses found in every environment to give you bonus multipliers. Progressive scoring setup, according to your skill level and speed in solving equations.
    Automatic transfer to a higher level once you've mastered the one you're on!

meta.name: Pac-Man
meta.desc:
Uno de los juegos más populares e influyentes de la década de 1980, Pac-Man protagoniza a un pequeño devorador de puntos amarillo que recorre un laberinto para eliminar los diversos puntos y frutas que habitan el tablero.
El objetivo de Pac-Man se ve constantemente desafiado por cuatro fantasmas: el tímido fantasma azul Tímido (Inky), el perseguidor fantasma rojo Sombra (Blinky), el rápido fantasma rosa Veloz (Pinky) y el olvidadizo fantasma naranja Tontín (Clyde). Un solo contacto con cualquiera de estos fantasmas significa perder una vida para Pac-Man.
Pac-Man puede cambiar las tornas con sus perseguidores al comerse una de las cuatro Energizers ubicadas dentro del laberinto. Durante este tiempo, los fantasmas se vuelven azules y Pac-Man puede comerlos para obtener puntos de bonificación. Esto solo dura un tiempo limitado, ya que los ojos de los fantasmas regresan a su caja central y se regeneran para perseguir a Pac-Man nuevamente.
Sobrevive algunas rondas de juego y disfruta de intermedios humorísticos entre Pac-Man y los fantasmas.

meta.name: Party Line : Blow Out
meta.desc: Two roller-skating dancers drop darts from a scaffold onto rising balloons. An easy enough task, except these rude guys keep bumping into each other and knocking each other off the scaffold. When the music stops, that's the signal for the next players to take the controllers.

meta.name: Hard Hat
meta.desc:
Place your workman on the floor where the center moving scaffold is. Run to the scaffold and your workman will jump from the building to the scaffold. Pick up a pane of glass and move it into place. Complete your building before your opponent does. If your opponent is getting ahead of you, do not fret; run over to his building and knock off his panes!
Programmers at Mattel Electronics came up with a series of casual games meant to be played at parties. The "Party Line" cartridge was shown at the 1984 CES but never produced.

meta.name: Space Cadet
meta.desc: Three new games in one bring new dimensions to home entertainment. Designed for two teams or two players, choose from games featuring rollerskaters, construction workers, or flying saucers.

meta.name: Space Cadet
meta.desc: Three new games in one bring new dimensions to home entertainment. Designed for two teams or two players, choose from games featuring rollerskaters, construction workers, or flying saucers.

meta.name: Pba Bowling
meta.desc:
This is a game of skill that requires you to knock down pins as in real bowling. Play alone or with up to three friends. Two game are available: standard bowling and pick-up spares. Pick-up spares sets the pins in a variety of ways to let you practice difficult shots.
Options allow you to select 1 of 10 conditions of alley slickness and the weight of your ball. Players can also choose to be a right or left handed bowler. While trying to knock down the pins you will need to control the curve and loft of the ball.

meta.name: Pga Golf
meta.desc: PGA Golf is a golf game played from an overhead point of view. Up to four players can compete on a nine hole, par 38 course containing a variety of terrain (greens, fairway, rough, water, and sand) as well as numerous trees. Each player has nine clubs (3 woods, 4 irons, a wedge, and a putter) and is able hook, slice, and control the power of each shot. You will receive penalty strokes for balls that land out of bounds and in the water, and of course the lowest score at the end of the round wins!

meta.name: Pinball
meta.desc: Pinball es una simulación de pinball para uno o dos jugadores. Comienzas el juego con cinco bolas y debes obtener la mayor cantidad de puntos posible golpeando la bola contra los diversos bumpers y objetivos en la mesa de pinball. La mesa de pinball consta de tres pantallas diferentes, cada una con un diseño y nivel de dificultad distintos. Para avanzar de una pantalla a la siguiente, debes usar una sola bola para golpear varios objetivos y luego hacer entrar la bola en una taza blanca que aparece. Si estás en la segunda o tercera pantalla y la bola se cae por la parte inferior, volverás a la pantalla inferior; si la bola se cae en la pantalla inferior, perderás esa bola. El juego termina cuando se han perdido las cinco bolas.

meta.name: Pitfall!
meta.desc: Pitfall! es un juego de acción y plataformas. Juegas como Pitfall Harry, quien se embarca en una búsqueda para encontrar tesoros en lo más profundo de la jungla. Con un poco de suerte, podrás encontrar bolsas de dinero, barras de plata, barras de oro y anillos de diamantes. Sin embargo, muchos obstáculos se interpondrán en tu camino, algunos simplemente restarán puntos de tu puntuación, mientras que otros serán mortales. Troncos rodantes y caer en un agujero restarán puntos, y escorpiones, caimanes, serpientes, pozos sin fondo, pantanos y fuego harán que Pitfall Harry pierda una vida. Tienes 20 minutos para intentar recolectar todos los tesoros en las numerosas pantallas, ¡si puedes sobrevivir tanto tiempo!

meta.name: Pole Position
meta.desc:
Pole Position is the conversion of the arcade racing game. Enter the Grand Prix, race against other racing cars to achieve the highest score possible in the shortest amount of time.
Before the player can enter the Grand Prix, the player must first qualify by competing in the Qualifying Lap within 73 seconds or less. If the player however, does not qualify in the Qualifying Lap, the player may continue to race until the Race Timer runs after 90 seconds. The player will score 50 point per 5 meters and additionally 50 points for every racing car passed. When the time runs out - Game Over. The player will have to restart the Qualifying Lap.

meta.name: Popeye
meta.desc: Popeye is a conversion of the arcade action/platform game. As Popeye, you are trying to win Olive Oyl's love! She is at the top of the screen dropping tokens of her love, and you need to collect them before they hit the ground. After you have collected the required number of items, you can move on to the next, more difficult level. There are many obstacles trying to stop you from completing your task, though! Brutus wanders around the screen and is constantly trying to catch you. If you collect a can of spinach, you can temporarily knock him out, otherwise Brutus will knock you out. Other objects such as bottles or birds are also flying around the screen and will cause you to lose one of your lives if you are hit. Each level features a different layout of platforms and ladders, and will have you collecting different items as they float towards the bottom of the screen!

meta.name: Q*bert
meta.desc: Q*bert is a conversion of the popular arcade game. The goal is to change all of the tiles on a pyramid to the target color. To do this you guide Q*bert around the pyramid, and every tile he hops on will change color. On early levels, a single hop will change the tile to the desired color, but on later levels you may need to hop on a tile multiple times or even avoid hopping on a tile multiple times! Trying to stop Q*bert are many different creatures which wander around the board, including Coily the snake, Slick and Sam, and falling balls. On the edge of the board are floating discs; if Q*bert jumps on one of these discs when the snake is in pursuit, the snake will fall off  the board while Q*bert is safely transported to the top.

meta.name: Racing Cars
meta.desc: Auto Racing pits two players against each other (or a single player against the clock) using a top-down perspective on one of five different race courses.

meta.name: Reversi
meta.desc: Reversi is a computerized version of the board game Othello. During the game, two players take turns placing game pieces on the board in an attempt to trap pieces of their opponents color. Any trapped pieces will then be reversed in color. When the board becomes completely filled up, whomever has the most pieces of his own color on the board wins. The game can be played by two players, or one player against the computer. There are three skill levels the computer can use, and three different board sizes are available, 6 by 6, 8 by 8, and 10 by 10.

meta.name: River Raid
meta.desc:
River Raid es un juego de acción de desplazamiento vertical. Vuelas en un jet por un río en un intento de destruir los puentes que son vitales para el enemigo. Sin embargo, el río está fuertemente custodiado, con globos, barcos, helicópteros y aviones enemigos que intentan detenerte. En el camino tendrás que volar sobre las estaciones de combustible para repostar el avión y seguir volando.
El avión está armado con un cañón con munición ilimitada. Se puede utilizar para destruir los vehículos enemigos y puentes, pero un jugador descuidado puede destruir accidentalmente una estación de combustible. Chocar con los margenes del río o con un avión enemigo destruye tu avión y te hace perder una vida.

meta.name: Robot Rubble
meta.desc:
A robot is shooting at you - lob a grenade to destroy it. Boom! But once it's gone, a tougher robot takes its place!
Steve Montero developed this game at Activision after programming the robot-themed Night Stalker at Mattel Electronics.  The game was completed in late 1983, just as Activision decided to give up on releasing new Intellivision titles.  It was finally released in 2001 on the Intellivision Rocks CD.

meta.name: Rocky & Bullwinckle
meta.desc: Math mode to this game. "Rocky and Bullwinkle must stop the evil Boris and Natasha from robbing a train full of priceless valuables. While Boris uses "Upsidasium" to float the valuables up to Natasha's waiting helicopter, Rocky must fly around and intercept them. When Rocky catches the valuables, he gives them to Bullwinkle for safe keeping."

meta.name: Royal Dealer
meta.desc: Pull up a chair and join the party! Your computer-controlled opponents are ready to take you on, in four card game classics -- Crazy Eights, Rummy, Gin Rummy and Hearts. Computer shuffles the deck and deals. Your choice of 1, 2 or 3 poker-faced ladies play the opposing hands. You provide the peanuts and chatter. The computer provides the challenge.

meta.name: Royal Dealer
meta.desc: Pull up a chair and join the party! Your computer-controlled opponents are ready to take you on, in four card game classics -- Crazy Eights, Rummy, Gin Rummy and Hearts. Computer shuffles the deck and deals. Your choice of 1, 2 or 3 poker-faced ladies play the opposing hands. You provide the peanuts and chatter. The computer provides the challenge.

meta.name: Safecracker
meta.desc: Safecracker te pone en el papel de uno de los espías más grandes de la historia, mientras conduces por las calles de una ciudad extranjera y te apoderas de cámaras secretas, llaves, microfilmes, frascos de productos químicos y barras de lingotes de oro. Mientras recorres la ciudad, debes evitar chocar contra bordillos u otros coches. Puedes disparar a los coches si quieres, pero esto atraerá a la Policía Secreta y sus balas. Debes dirigirte a una de las embajadas, donde podrás aprender la combinación necesaria para abrir la bóveda del tesoro. También es donde puedes encontrar la mayoría de los objetos secretos. Después de abrir las cerraduras de combinación de cuatro embajadas, tendrás los dos números secretos necesarios para abrir la caja fuerte del tesoro, que contiene el oro. La forma más rentable de abrir una caja fuerte es elegir su combinación encontrando las secuencias numéricas correctas. Esto implica recorrer varios números (del 0 al 99) en tu teclado. Elige números hasta que no haya más que encontrar. Si te encuentras sin tiempo, simplemente puedes hacer explotar la caja fuerte con dinamita. Sin embargo, no obtendrás puntos y la Policía Secreta responderá a una alarma que se activará automáticamente.

meta.name: Scarfinger
meta.desc: The last two agents we sent on this mission didn't come back. You're the only one we have left for the job. Mr. Andreas Skarfos, alias 'Scarfinger',has seized an island and set up a fortress there. He has a number of missiles capable of delivering nuclear warheads to any part of the globe, and unless we answer his demands, he will destroy us. His installations are all but invulnerable to surface attack, but we've discovered a tunnel which leads under the island. If one man could somehow reach the tunnel, they could stop Scarfinger!

p: intellivision TORRENTS/Scooby Doo's Maze Chase (USA, Europe).zip.torrent

meta.name: Scooby Doo's Maze Chase
meta.desc:
¡Scooby-Dooby-Doo!
El popular perro de dibujos animados de televisión tuvo su primera conversión a videojuego en este juego de laberinto similar a Pac-Man. Controlas a Scooby mientras persigue a los fantasmas a través de un laberinto mientras él mismo es perseguido por una calavera con huesos cruzados. Si se atrapan tres fantasmas dentro de un límite de tiempo, la calavera desaparecerá y aparecerá un sándwich submarino. Cuando lo comes, obtienes un hueso mágico que, al dejarlo caer en el camino de la calavera, la congela momentáneamente en su lugar. Cuando la calavera atrapa a Scooby, la dificultad disminuye. Hay 10 laberintos en total, pero con el complemento del teclado para Intellivision también puedes crear tus propios laberintos.

meta.name: Sea Battle
meta.desc: Sea Battle is a strategic game for two players only. Each player controls a fleet of ships including Submarines, Destroyers, and Battleships. The goal is to engage and sink enemy ships. The winner is the player who commands the troop transport ship into the opponent's harbor. There are two phases in Sea Battle; the strategy phase, and the combat phase. The strategy phase includes maneuvering your fleet into different strategic positions on the map, laying mines, and repair fleets. Opponents engage in ship-to-ship warfare in the combat phase, triggered by the ENGAGE button. Each of the different types of ships has there own strengths and weaknesses, such as weapon range and maneuverability.

meta.name: Sewer Sam
meta.desc:
It's a lovely day and Sam is waiting in Central Park to meet his girlfriend Sally. He sees her and walks to her. He only has eyes for her and before he realizes it he finds himself in the New York sewer system.
Three Russian submarines have been located in the New York sewer system and they have blocked off the system.
Sam's only way out of the sewer system is to destroy the Russian submarines. Luckily, Sam carries his revolver.
Sam can't go back... once he's gone through the City Sewer Department seals the tunnel. Luckily, Sam carries his revolver.
The sewer system has three types of sewer tunnels. Tunnels with solid dry floors, tunnels with a water passage in the middle and tunnels with pits. 
Sam can walk, run and creep through the tunnels but Sam can't move as quickly in water.
Sam can move from tunnel to tunnel by entering one of the passages that appear occasionally on his way.
Each time he enters a new sewer, Sam receives a fresh supply of oxygen.
On it's way through the sewer system Sam is under attack by nasties like rats, bats, spiders and more.
The ultimate nasties are the Russian submarines. They are located only in water canals. The status bar at the top of the screen contains a distance indicator. It tells you how far Sam has traveled into the sewer. If it's red, it means there's a dreaded submarine at the end of the sewer.
The more nasty elements you shoot, the higher you'll score.

meta.name: Shark! Shark!
meta.desc: En Shark! Shark!, ¡controlas a un pez! Tu objetivo es obtener la mayor cantidad de puntos posible mientras te mantienes con vida. Nadando en el océano junto a ti hay otros peces de diferentes tamaños, langostas, cangrejos, medusas y un tiburón muy rápido. Puedes comer cualquier pez que sea más pequeño que tú, ¡pero cuidado, cualquier pez más grande te devorará! El tiburón también puede ser eliminado si le mordisqueas la cola varias veces, pero ten cuidado, ya que el tiburón puede girar rápidamente. Cada vez que comes un pez o mordisqueas la cola del tiburón, ganas puntos. Cada vez que alcanzas los 1000 puntos, tu pez crecerá en tamaño, lo que te permitirá comer aún más peces en la pantalla. Se incluyen varias velocidades de juego diferentes y uno o dos jugadores pueden jugar.

meta.name: Sharp Shot
meta.desc:
Sharp Shot is collection of 4 single-button action games: Touchdown Passing, Space Gunner, Submarine, and Maze Shoot. The goal of each game is to score as many points as possible within 60 seconds.
1. Touchdown Passing - Play as the quarterback and pass the ball to your receiving end waiting at the goal. Be careful not to let the opposing team intercept the pass! Touchdown Passing offers gameplay for one player or 2 players alternating turns.
2. Space Gunner - Squadrons of enemy alien ships fly through your cross hairs. Time your shots right and blast as many ships as you can! Space Gunner offers gameplay for one player or 2 simultaneous players.
3. Submarine - Fire torpedoes from your sub to sink as many enemy ships as you can within 60 second. Submarine offers gameplay for one player or 2 players alternating turns.
4. Maze Shoot - Use your bow and arrow to fend monsters off of your piles of treasures located at different points in a maze. Shoot at corners to ricochet your shots down different corridors of the maze. Maze Shoot offers gameplay for one player or 2 simultaneous players.

p: intellivision TORRENTS/Slam Dunk - Super Pro Basketball (USA).zip.torrent

meta.name: Slam Dunk: Super Pro Basketball
meta.desc: En ese momento, este era el único cartucho de juego deportivo que te permitía ser propietario y administrar tu equipo. Seleccionando de un grupo de 70 jugadores, cada uno con estadísticas tomadas de la NBA real (y atribuidos con nombres 'falsos' para evitar problemas de licencia), cada jugador debe administrar los salarios para mantenerse dentro del límite salarial. Como jugador/propietario, corres, pasas, disparas, defiendes y reboteas. Mantén un ojo en tus jugadores: si se cansan, juegan peor. ¡Y no te olvides del reloj de posesión de 24 segundos!

p: intellivision TORRENTS/Slap Shot - Super Pro Hockey (USA).zip.torrent

meta.name: Slap Shot: Super Pro Hockey
meta.desc:
Super Pro Hockey es un juego de hockey para uno o dos jugadores. Después de seleccionar si se quiere jugar uno o dos jugadores, se pueden elegir cuatro niveles de habilidad/dificultad: Amateur, Novato, Profesional y Super Pro. Básicamente, cambiar la dificultad afecta la velocidad del juego, desde baja (Amateur) hasta alta (Super Pro). No hay equipos, solo el equipo de casa y el visitante.
Cada equipo tiene tres jugadores y un portero. El equipo de casa es de color marrón claro y el equipo visitante es de color verde. El jugador solo puede controlar a un personaje a la vez, y este personaje tiene un color más claro que el resto de su equipo. Los porteros son controlados por la computadora.

meta.name: Snafu
meta.desc:
Snafu is an arcade action game similar to the Atari game Surround. You control a constantly moving and growing wall; the goal is to trap all of your opponents before you become trapped yourself. If you crash into the borders of the screen, into another players wall, or your own wall, you are out for that round. The last player left standing wins the round! Several game options are available which allow or forbid diagonal movement, set obstacles in the playfield, allow a players wall to disappear or remain on the screen after they crash, control the speed of movement, and select the number of rounds to play. The game can be played by one or two human players, and optionally two additional computer players can be added for up to four players on the screen at a time.
Also included is a two player only game where you control a serpent containing 10 links, and your goal is to bite the links off of your opponent one at a time. Only the very last link of the serpent can be bitten off, so you need to be sure you keep your tail away from your opponent! The screen walls and the players links are non lethal if you crash into them in this variation, however if you double back accross your own path you will lose a link. The first player to bite off all of his opponents links wins.

meta.name: Space Armada
meta.desc: Space Armada es un clon del juego Space Invaders. Filas de alienígenas que lanzan bombas están invadiendo tu planeta natal, ¡y debes protegerlo! Controlas un cañón láser en la parte inferior de la pantalla; tu objetivo es ganar la mayor cantidad de puntos posible destruyendo las oleadas de alienígenas que atacan desde la parte superior de la pantalla. Los alienígenas avanzan constantemente hacia abajo, y si llegan al suelo o te quedas sin cañones láser, el juego termina. Cuando destruyes a todos los alienígenas de una oleada, pasas a la siguiente ronda, que será más desafiante. De vez en cuando, un platillo volante pasará por la parte superior de la pantalla, y puedes dispararle para obtener puntos extra.

meta.name: Space Battle
meta.desc:
5 alien squadrons are closing in on your Mother ship, you have 3 squadrons with which to defend her. Check enemy positions on Radar Screen, then dispatch your squadrons. When they reach alien squadrons, GO TO BATTLE! When the screen switches to Battle, you move the gun sight to aim and fire converging missiles. Watch out! The aliens shoot back.
It's you against computer-controlled invaders.
SPACE BATTLE can be played at 5 different speeds. Selecting a game speed takes you to Radar Screen and starts the game.
BEGINNING SPEED (slow) - Press 3
MEDIUM SPEED - Press 2
FAST SPEED - Press 1
ADVANCED SPEED - Press Direction Disc
SUPER ADVANCED SPEED - Press 4

meta.name: Space Battle

When they reach alien squadrons, GO TO BATTLE! When the screen switches to Battle, you move the gun sight to aim and fire converging missiles. Watch out! The aliens shoot back.

MEDIUM SPEED - Press 2
FAST SPEED - Press 1
ADVANCED SPEED - Press Direction Disc
SUPER ADVANCED SPEED - Press 4

meta.name: Space Hawk
meta.desc: Space Hawk is an arcade action game feature gameplay similar to Asteroids. You are an astronaut stuck in deep space. You are equipped with a jet pack to help move around, and a laser gun to destroy enemies. Your main enemy is a white space hawk which wanders around the screen, leaving a trail of deadly bubbles behind him. Try to score as many points as you can be destroying both the space hawk and the bubbles, both of which are constantly trying to get you. In case of emergencies,  you have the ability to enter hyperspace which will temporarily bring you away from danger. Hyperspace ability is limited, however, so be sure to conserve if you can!

meta.name: Space Spartans
meta.desc:
Al igual que los antiguos espartanos que lucharon (y ganaron) contra el ejército persa en la batalla de las Termópilas, eres la última línea de defensa antes de la invasión alienígena.
El juego consta de dos pantallas. Al comenzar, una voz femenina te da la bienvenida como comandante de la nave espacial. Tienes tres bases estelares que debes defender mientras las naves alienígenas te rodean. Luego, eliges un sector espacial en el que entrarás en la sección de batalla.
Tu nave tiene 5 sistemas (Ordenador de Batalla, Impulso, Hiperimpulso, Ordenador de Seguimiento y Escudos): si tu nave es golpeada, puedes reparar el daño en una base estelar. Las reparaciones durante las batallas están permitidas, pero son más lentas, consumen energía de la nave y no pueden reparar sistemas de la nave destruidos. El juego termina cuando te quedas sin energía y/o tu nave es destruida. La nave se destruye cuando todos los sistemas están destruidos, o si el Hiperimpulso hace explotar la nave (con un 50% de probabilidad si usas el Hiperimpulso cuando está destruida).

meta.name: Spiker: Super Pro Volleyball
meta.desc:
Features Indoor (6-man) volleyball in a gymnasium and Outdoor (2-man) volleyball on the beach. Realistic volleyball simulation featuring serving, bumping, sets, jumps, spikes, blocks, dives, and digs.
As player, you control every member of your team. Aim your serves; pass the ball to the setter; crank on the spike; leap to block the spike.

meta.name: Stadium Mud Buggies
meta.desc: Get down and dirty with Stadium Mud Buggies for the Intellivision, where the object is to score points by driving in nine events: Hill Climb, Drag Race, Bog, Tug-O-War, Car Crush, Donuts, Drawbridge, Combo Course and Monster Rally, which consists of all the events in order. You can compete against a friend, a computer driver, or against your own high score.

meta.name: Stampede
meta.desc: ¡Es un estampida! Tu trabajo es reunir la mayor cantidad posible de terneros. La pantalla se desplaza hacia la derecha mientras persigues a los terneros; si más de tres terneros te pasan, el juego termina. Los terneros corren a diferentes velocidades, y cuando los enlazas, ganas puntos basados en qué tan rápido estaban corriendo. A medida que el juego avanza, habrá cada vez más terneros en la pantalla al mismo tiempo, y comenzarán a aparecer otros obstáculos para hacer tropezar a tu caballo y desacelerarte.

meta.name: Star Strike
meta.desc: Star Strike was clearly inspired by the Death Star battle sequence in the movie Star Wars. You fly a space craft into the enemy launch trench. Your mission: to destroy the alien station before Earth passes directly over the launch trench. You must evade the alien ships that are defending the launch trench while being sure to bomb the red "Hot Targets". The very first red target that is missed when the Earth is directly in the middle of the launch trench becomes a missile. The missile is launched and destroys Earth.

meta.name: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
meta.desc:
El Imperio contraataca! Un ejército de AT-AT Imperiales se dirige hacia el Generador de Fuerza de los Rebeldes en el Planeta Helado Hoth R*. Si llegan al Generador, la base Rebelde será completamente aniquilada. Los Rebeldes, para detener a los AT-AT deben confiar en los misiles de sus Snowspeeders R*. Los Snowspeeders son rápidos y maniobreros y en manos de un commandante hábil y decidido pueden destruir a los poderosos AT-AT.
Entre en su Snowspeeder y esté alerta para enfrentarse con el primero de sus mortales enemigos.

meta.name: Sub Hunt
meta.desc: En Sub Hunt, controlas un grupo de cuatro submarinos, uno a la vez. El objetivo es destruir seis convoyes que intentarán cruzar la zona marítima que estás protegiendo. Puedes apuntar y disparar torpedos utilizando una vista desde el periscopio, hacer que tu submarino se sumerja y salga a la superficie, y ajustar tu velocidad. Una pantalla aérea te permite mover estratégicamente tus submarinos a la posición que elijas. Hay cinco niveles de dificultad para elegir.

meta.name: Super Cobra
meta.desc:
Super Cobra es un juego de disparos de desplazamiento lateral basado en el juego de arcade.Eres un piloto de helicópteros en una misión de vigilancia en territorio enemigo, tu objetivo es superar las diversas carreras de obstáculos y obtener tantos puntos como sea posible.
Los edificios altos, las montañas, los túneles estrechos y varios enemigos (como tanques, cohetes, minas y más) pueden interponerse en tu camino y destruir su helicóptero si no tienes cuidado.
Para ayudar a defenderte, el helicóptero está armado con una ametralladora y bombas que pueden usarse para destruir los tanques y cohetes enemigos.
Para hacer la tarea más difícil, tu helicóptero tiene una cantidad limitada de combustible.
A lo largo de los paisajes hay tanques de combustible : si uno de estos se dispara o bombardea, se le otorgará combustible extra.

meta.name: Super Masters!
meta.desc: He-Man returns to battle Skeletor in another cartridge based on Mattel's Masters of the Universe action figures.

meta.name: Super Pro Decathlon
meta.desc: Super Pro Decathlon lets you and up to three friends compete in 10 track-and-field events. You can enter the Practice mode in order to train yourself on individual events, or you can go for broke and play the full 10-event Decathlon. Each event has a minimum time, distance, or height you must beat in order to qualify. Three difficulty levels are available: Amateur, Olympic and Super Pro.

meta.name: Super Pro Football
meta.desc:
Super Pro Football is a one or two-player football game.  There are only two teams, the Home Team and the Visiting Team (orange and blue respectively).  Quarterbacks are colored differently than the rest of the team--red and dark blue for the Home and Visiting teams.
After pressing Enter from the title screen, the player has the options of selecting if the players will be human or computer, and then their difficulty level, or rating--Rookie or Super Pro.  
Prior to playing the game, the player (or computer) can select from a wide list of options and planning strategies for playing the game.  
Options for the Defensive team include Formation, Tactic, Timeout, Stats, Controls, and Break.  "Break" exits the menu and begins gameplay.  "Stats" contains all the current information on the game including the timer, score, down, quarter, and time outs.  There are nine Formations to choose from, and four options under Tactics.  Formations can also be changed on the gameplay screen prior to the opponent team hiking the ball.  Controls are pretty basic, only really involving the control wheel.
The options for the Offensive team include Formation, Kick, Recover 1, Recover 2, Timeout, Stats, Controls, and Break.  A "program receiver" appears under the Recover options.  Like defense, there are nine formation options.  Controls are more involved in offensive play, including hiking, kicking, passing high or low, and running.
The game is seen from a top-down view and scrolls left-to-right to move with the gameplay.
